Allabar, Opener of the Way.name: 阿拉巴，开路者 Allabar, Opener of the Way
Allabar, Opener of the Way.description:
生命值 1100; 重伤 550先攻 +25 | 行动点 2 | 豁免 +5
AC 45Fort 43Ref 41Will 43
速度 6, 飞行 6 （盘旋）
属性力量 30 (+25)
体质 27 (+23)		敏捷 26 (+23)
智力 29 (+24)		感知 31 (+25)
魅力 28 (+24)
语言 Deep Speech, telepathy 50

被动 侦查 35 | 洞察 35

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⌀ <b>Gravity Well</b> ✦ <b>Aura</b> 20</p><p>Any enemy that starts its turn within the aura is pulled a number of squares depending on Allabar’s current hit points: 776 to 1,100, 1 square; 551 to 775, 2 squares; 226 to 550, 4 squares; 1 to 225, 8 squares. </p>]] ⌀ 重力井 Gravity Gravity Well ✦ 灵气 20

在其回合开始时位于灵气内的任何敌人会被拉向阿拉巴，移动格数取决于阿拉巴的当前生命值：776至1,100，1格；551至775，2格；226至550，4格；1至225，8格。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>All-Around Vision </b> <b></b></p><p>Enemies can’t gain 战斗优势 by flanking Allabar. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Bloodied Fury </b> <b></b></p><p>Whenever Allabar is 重伤, it gains an extra standard action during each turn, even if it is 晕眩.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Tentacle</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 4 (one creature); +35 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 15 伤害, and 目标 is restrained until the end of Allabar’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 触手 Tentacle ✦ 随意

标准动作 [[/roll 3d8 + 15#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Tentacle</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 15 伤害, and 目标 is restrained until the end of Allabar’s next turn.</p>]]

攻击：近程 4（一个生物） [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Triple Attack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Allabar uses tentacle three times, making each attack against a different target.</p>]]

+35 vs. AC [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Devour Body</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 1 (enemies in the burst at 0 hit points or fewer); +33 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> Allabar pulls 目标 into its space, 目标 dies, and psionic boost recharges.</p>]]

命中：3d8 + 15伤害，并且目标被束缚直到阿拉巴的下个回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Wrath of the Forsaken World</b> (psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast); +33 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d10 + 25 psychic 伤害, and 目标 sprouts a hostile tentacle （豁免终止）. While 目标 is affected by the hostile tentacle, any ally of 目标 that ends its turn within 2 squares of 目标 takes 20 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 4d10 + 25#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Wrath of the Forsaken World</b> (psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d10 + 25 psychic 伤害, and 目标 sprouts a hostile tentacle （豁免终止）. While 目标 is affected by the hostile tentacle, any ally of 目标 that ends its turn within 2 squares of 目标 takes 20 伤害.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Unravel Essence</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when no enemy is affected by this power</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 4 (one creature); +33 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> Ongoing 20 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>First Failed Saving Throw:</i> The ongoing 伤害 increases to 25.</p><p><i>Second Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target is also 虚弱 and 虚体 (save ends all).</p><p><i>Third Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target drops to 0 hit points unless it is already below 0 hit points.</p>]] ⚔ 瓦解本质 Unravel Unravel Essence ✦ 充能 when no enemy is affected by this power

次要动作

攻击：近程 4（一个生物）

+33 vs. 强韧

命中：持续20伤害（豁免终止）。

第一次豁免失败：持续伤害增加至25。

第二次豁免失败：目标同时陷入虚弱和虚体状态（豁免终止所有）。

第三次豁免失败：目标生命值降至0，除非它已经低于0。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Psionic Boost</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when Allabar takes psychic 伤害</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> Allabar hits with tentacle.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The attack deals 4d10 extra psychic 伤害.</p>]] 灵能强化 Psionic Psionic Boost (psychic) ✦ 充能 when Allabar takes psychic 伤害

触发动作 [[/roll 4d10 #<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Psionic Boost</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when Allabar takes psychic 伤害</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The attack deals 4d10 extra psychic 伤害.</p>]]

触发：阿拉巴以触手命中。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Psychic Feedback</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy damages Allabar.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The triggering enemy is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p>]] 心灵反馈 Psychic Psychic Feedback ✦ 随意

While in this form, it is immune to all 伤害. When the effect ends, the angel makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 2 (enemies in the burst); +22 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 18 cold and fire 伤害.</p>]] ᗕ 冰焰之柱转换 Coldfire Pillar Coldfire Pillar Transformation (cold, fire, polymorph) ✦ 遭遇

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Double Actions</b> <b></b></p><p>At the start of combat, the aspect of Demogorgon makes two initiative checks. Each check corresponds to one of the aspect’s heads—Aameul or Hethradiah—and the aspect takes a turn on each initiative count. The aspect has a full set of actions on each of these turns, and the aspect’s ability to take an immediate action refreshes on each turn.</p>]] 双重动作 Double Double Actions

在战斗开始时，狄摩高根的化身进行两次先攻检定。每次检定分别代表狄摩高根的化身的两个头——阿穆尔和海斯拉蒂，且狄摩高根的化身在这两个先攻序位都获得一个回合。狄摩高根的化身在其每个回合都有一套独立完整的动作，且狄摩高根的化身的直觉动作在每个回合都会恢复。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Dual Brain</b> <b></b></p><p>At the end of its turn, the aspect of Demogorgon saves against 晕眩 and 震慑 conditions and charm effects.</p>]]

在战斗开始时，狄摩高根的化身进行两次先攻检定。每次检定分别代表狄摩高根的化身的两个头——阿穆尔和海斯拉蒂，且狄摩高根的化身在这两个先攻序位都获得一个回合。狄摩高根的化身在其每个回合都有一套独立完整的动作，且狄摩高根的化身的直觉动作在每个回合都会恢复。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Worthy Sacrifice</b> (zone) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Choose a nonminion demon, drow, or spider ally within 10 squares of the aspect of Lolth. 触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Swallow</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> A Large or smaller enemy marked by the warder makes an attack that does not include the warder as a target.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The warder shifts 3 squares to a space adjacent to the triggering enemy and makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (the triggering enemy); +19 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is removed from play. Until the effect ends, 目标 takes 持续 10 伤害. The target can take actions as normal and can make melee and close attacks against the warder. The effect ends when the warder drops to 0 hit points or when the warder ends the effect as a free action. When the effect ends, 目标 appears in an unoccupied space of its choice adjacent to the warder.</p>]] ⚔ 吞咽 Swallow ✦ 随意

触发：一个被该邦德怪守卫标记的大型或更小的敌人发动一次目标不包括该邦德怪守卫的攻击。

效果（直觉反应）：该邦德怪守卫快步三格到一个邻接触发的敌人的空间并进行下述攻击。攻击：近战 1（触发的敌人）+19vs.强韧

命中：目标被除出游戏。直到该效果终止，目标受到 10 点持续伤害。目标可以如常进行动作且可以对该邦德怪守卫进行近战和近程攻击。当该邦德怪守卫的生命值降到 0 或当该邦德怪守卫以一个自由动作终止该效果时该效果终止。当该效果终止时，目标出现在由其选择的一个邻接该邦德怪守卫的不被占据的空间。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>No Escape</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy marked by the warder ends its move.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The warder teleports 10 squares to a space adjacent to the triggering enemy.</p>]] 别想逃 No No Escape (teleportation) ✦ 遭遇

每当该巨魔开始回合且至少拥有 1 点生命值时它恢复 5 点生命值。当该巨魔受到火焰或强酸伤害时，它的再生在其下回合无效。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Troll Healing </b> (healing) <b></b></p><p>Whenever an attack that doesn’t deal acid or fire 伤害 reduces the troll to 0 hit points, the troll does not die and instead falls unconscious until the start of its next turn, when it returns to life with 15 hit points. If an attack hits the troll and deals any acid or fire 伤害 while the troll is unconscious, it does not return to life in this way.</p>]]

特性

Sleep Ray (charm):</i> Ranged 10; +24 vs. Will; 目标 falls unconscious （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>4. Telekinesis Ray:</i> Ranged 10; +24 vs. Fortitude; the beholder slides 目标 up to 4 squares.</p><p><i>5. Bite.name: 啮咬 Bite
Bite.description:
啮咬 Bite

基本近战：啮咬·随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+24 vs. AC

命中：4d8+7 伤害。

Eye Rays.name: 眼魔射线 Eye Rays
Eye Rays.description:
眼魔射线 Eye Rays

远程：眼魔射线·随意

效果：该眼魔使用下列的两种眼魔射线，每种眼魔射线各对不同的目标使用。该攻击不会引发借机攻击。

1. 炙热射线（光耀）：射程 10；+24 vs. 反射；3d10+11 光耀伤害。

2. 枯萎射线（黯蚀）：射程 10；+24 vs. 强韧；2d8+9 伤害，以及 10 持续黯蚀伤害（豁免终止）。

3. 昏睡射线（魅惑）：射程 10；+24 vs. 意志；目标昏迷（豁免终止）。

4. 念动射线：射程 10；+24 vs. 强韧；该眼魔滑移目标最多 4 格。

5. 禁锢射线：射程 10；+24 vs. 反射；目标受缚（豁免终止）。

6. 混乱射线（魅惑）：射程 10；+24 vs. 意志；目标以一个自由动作对它最近的一个可以被冲锋到的盟友进行冲锋。

7. 恐怖射线（恐惧，心灵）：射程 10；+24 vs. 意志；2d12+8 心灵伤害，且目标以一个自由动作移动其速度。如果它停止移动时离眼魔的距离不比原先大上至少 4 格，则目标再受到 2d12+8 心灵伤害。

8. 石化射线：射程 10；+24 vs. 强韧；目标迟缓（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：目标定身代替迟缓（豁免终止）。

第二次豁免失败时：目标石化。

9. 死亡射线（黯蚀）：射程 10；+24 vs. 强韧；4d10+6 黯蚀伤害。如果目标在该攻击之前或之后处于重伤，则目标晕眩（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：目标晕眩且虚弱（豁免终止两者）。

第二次豁免失败时：目标死亡。

10. 解离射线：射程 10；+24 vs. 强韧；2d10+9 伤害，以及 2d20 持续伤害（豁免终止）。

Eye Ray Frenzy.name: 眼魔射线狂怒 Eye Ray Frenzy
Eye Ray Frenzy.description:

前提：该眼魔必须处于重伤。

效果：如上述眼魔射线，只是该眼魔可以进行四种眼魔射线攻击。

4-念动射线：射程 8；+10 vs. 强韧；该高斯眼魔滑移目标最多 4 格。

Eye Rays.name: 眼魔射线 Eye Rays
Eye Rays.description:
眼魔射线 Eye Rays

远程：眼魔射线·随意

效果：该眼魔使用下列的两种眼魔射线，每种眼魔射线各对不同的目标使用。该攻击不会引发借机攻击。

1. 魅惑射线（魅惑）：射程 10；+14 vs. 意志；目标受控直到其下回合结束。

2. 创伤射线（黯蚀）：射程 10；+14 vs. 强韧；2d10+6 黯蚀伤害。

3. 昏睡射线（魅惑）：射程 10；+14 vs. 意志；目标定身（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：目标昏迷代替定身（豁免终止）。

4. 念动射线：射程 10；+14 vs. 强韧；该眼魔滑移目标最多 4 格。

5. 迟缓射线（黯蚀）：射程 10；+14 vs. 反射；3d6+5 黯蚀伤害，且目标迟缓（豁免终止）。

6. 光耀射线（光耀）：射程 10；+14 vs. 意志；1d6+5 光耀伤害，且目标目盲（豁免终止）。

7. 恐怖射线（恐惧，心灵）：射程 10；+14 vs. 意志；2d8+5 心灵伤害，且该眼魔推动目标其速度的格数。

8. 石化射线：射程 10；+14 vs. 强韧；目标石化（豁免终止）。

后效：目标定身（豁免结束）。

9. 死亡射线（黯蚀）：射程 10；+14 vs. 强韧；2d8+10 黯蚀伤害。如果目标在该攻击之前或之后重伤，则目标晕眩（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：目标晕眩且虚弱（豁免终止两者）。

第二次豁免失败时：目标死亡。

10. 解离射线：射程 10；+14 vs. 强韧；1d8+5 伤害，以及 10 点持续伤害（豁免终止）。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Withering Gaze</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when no enemy is affected by this power</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 10 (one 重伤 creature in the burst); +21 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d8 + 9 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 虚弱 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>First Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target is 虚弱 and 目盲 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Second Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target’s hit points drop to -1.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Inevitable Call</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Choose one enemy within 20 squares. The tragedian pulls that enemy 3 squares.</p>]] ᗕ 不可抗呼唤 Inevitable Inevitable Call (charm) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Final Glance</b> (charm, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy within 5 squares of the tragedian willingly moves away from it.</p><p><i>Attack (Opportunity Action):</i> Close burst 10 (the triggering enemy in the burst); +21 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 10 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 and gains vulnerable 5 to all 伤害 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Aftereffect:</i> 20 necrotic 伤害.</p>]] ᗕ 终焉一瞥 Final Final Glance (charm, necrotic) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Filament Strangle</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one creature); +7 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 4 伤害, and the angler pulls 目标 3 squares. The target is restrained （豁免终止）. The effect also ends if 目标 teleports or if 目标 or another creature hits the filament in 目标’s square. The filament uses the angler’s defenses. An attack against the filament deals no 伤害 or effects to the angler. Only one creature can be restrained by this attack at a time. The angler can pull 目标 vertically, and 目标 can end the pull suspended in air.</p><p><i>Sustain Standard:</i> The target takes 1d6 + 4 伤害, and the angler pulls 目标 3 squares.</p>]] ➶ 丝线绞杀 Filament Filament Strangle ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Heart of the Nightmare</b> (fire) ✦ Recharge ⚅</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The trampler moves its speed and can move through enemies’ spaces during the move. Any creature that hits the trampler with an opportunity attack provoked by this movement takes 10 fire 伤害. Each time the trampler enters an enemy’s space for the first time during the move, it makes the following attack against that enemy.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 0 (creature in space); +16 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 7 伤害, and the enemy falls prone.</p>]]

If the attack hits, the trampler pushes 目标 2 squares and knocks it prone.</p>]] ⚔ 践踏者残暴 Trampler Trampler Ferocity

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Soulsword</b> (necrotic, weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +22 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 12 necrotic 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The death knight marks 目标 until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 灵魂之刃 Soulsword (necrotic, weapon) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+22 vs. AC [[/roll 3d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Soulsword</b> (necrotic, weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 12 necrotic 伤害.</p>]]

命中：3d8+12 黯蚀伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Containing Strike</b> (necrotic, weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The death knight must be wielding a soulsword.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one or two creatures); +22 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 +12 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The death knight marks 目标 until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Unholy Flames</b> (fire, necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 2 (living creatures in the burst); +20 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 6d8 + 12 fire and necrotic 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Each undead ally in the burst deals 2d6 extra fire 伤害 with melee attacks until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 6d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Unholy Flames</b> (fire, necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 6d8 + 12 fire and necrotic 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d6 #<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Unholy Flames</b> (fire, necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Each undead ally in the burst deals 2d6 extra fire 伤害 with melee attacks until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Warrior’s Challenge</b> (necrotic, weapon) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The death knight must be wielding a soulsword.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one or two creatures); +22 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 19 necrotic 伤害, and the death knight pushes 目标 up to 2 squares. The death knight marks 每个敌人 within 2 squares of 目标 until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 4d8 + 19#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Warrior’s Challenge</b> (necrotic, weapon) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 19 necrotic 伤害, and the death knight pushes 目标 up to 2 squares. The death knight marks 每个敌人 within 2 squares of 目标 until the end of the death knight’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Combat Challenge</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy adjacent to and marked by the death knight shifts or makes an attack that doesn’t include it as a target.</p><p><i>Effect (Opportunity Action):</i> The death knight uses soulsword against the triggering enemy.</p>]] ⚔ 战斗挑战 Combat Combat Challenge ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Implacable</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The death knight becomes marked, 迟缓, 定身, 晕眩, or 震慑 by an effect.</p><p><i>Effect (Opportunity Action):</i> The death knight makes a 豁免检定 to end the triggering effect, even if the effect would not normally end on a save.</p>]] 愤怒 Implacable ✦ 随意

生命值 492; 重伤 246

AC 26Fort 26Ref 24Will 24

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Action Recovery</b> <b></b></p><p>Whenever the dragon ends its turn, any dazing, stunning, or dominating effect on it ends.</p>]] 行动恢复 Action Action Recovery

每当该龙巫妖结束回合时，其身上任何晕眩、震慑或受控效果终止。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Instinctive Domination</b> <b></b></p><p>On an initiative of 10 + its initiative check, the dragon can use a free action to use mesmerizing glance. This attack does not provoke opportunity attacks. If the dragon cannot use a free action to make this attack due to a dominating or stunning effect, then that effect ends instead of the dragon making the attack.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +17 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10 + 9 伤害, and 持续 10 necrotic 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite (necrotic) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+17 vs. AC [[/roll 2d10 + 9#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10 + 9 伤害, and 持续 10 necrotic 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

命中：2d10+9 伤害，以及 10 点持续黯蚀伤害（豁免终止）。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Claws</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one or two creatures); +17 vs. AC. If the dragon targets only one creature, it can make this attack twice against that creature</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 9 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The dracolich slides 目标 up to 2 squares.</p>]]

[[/roll 3d6 + 9#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Claws</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 9 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Breath Weapon</b> (necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast); +15 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d12 + 8 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 虚弱 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害, and 目标 is 虚弱 until the end of its next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 3d12 + 8#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Breath Weapon</b> (necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d12 + 8 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 虚弱 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Mesmerizing Glance</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will (1/round)</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one creature); +15 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is 受控 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> If 目标 willingly moves to a square nearer to or adjacent to the dracolich before the end of its next turn, it takes 15 psychic 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The dracolich slides 目标 up to 2 squares.</p>]] ➶ 魅惑凝视 Mesmerizing Mesmerizing Glance (charm, psychic) ✦ At-Will (1/round)

效果（自由动作）：龙息充能，且该龙巫妖使用它。

If the enemy is 晕眩, it must also make a basic attack against its nearest ally as a free action.</p>]] ⌀ 深渊意志 Abyssal Abyssal Mind (charm, psychic, psychic) ✦ 灵气 3

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Glaive</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +12 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d4 + 5 伤害, or 6d4 + 15 if 目标 cannot see the gnoll.</p>]] (⚔) 大砍刀 Glaive (weapon) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Stare into the Abyss</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 3 (enemies in the burst that can see the gnoll); +10 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is 晕眩 until the end of the gnoll’s next turn.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The gnoll becomes 隐形 to 目标s until the end of its next turn.</p>]] ᗕ 深渊凝视 Stare into the Stare into the Abyss ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Battleaxe</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The fanatic ends any mark on it, shifts 2 squares, and makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +19 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10 + 11 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 战斧 Battleaxe (weapon) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Strength of Madness</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The fanatic can use strength of madness only during its turn.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Roll a d6 and add the result as a power bonus to the fanatic’s attack rolls until the end of its next turn. In addition, the fanatic grants 战斗优势 until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 疯狂之力 Strength of Strength of Madness ✦ 遭遇

In addition, the fanatic grants 战斗优势 until the end of its next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Rising Burst</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The bulette must be underground.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The bulette moves up to its speed to a square aboveground. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. When it first enters a square aboveground during this movement, it makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 3 (creatures in the burst); +23 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d12 + 10 伤害.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p>]]

命中：2d4+6 伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Perfect Replica</b> (illusion, polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Melee 1 (one Medium creature). [[/roll 6d8 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Perfect Replica</b> (illusion, polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Melee 1 (one Medium creature). The doppelganger takes on the form of 目标 and alters its clothing and gear to match those of 目标. Until the end of the doppelganger’s next turn, 目标 is 定身 and takes 6d8 extra 伤害 from the doppelganger’s dagger power. See also replica switch.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Change Shape</b> (polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b> polymorph</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The doppelganger alters its physical form to appear as a Medium humanoid until it uses change shape again or until it drops to 0 hit points. To assume a specific individual’s form, the doppelganger must have seen that individual. Other creatures can make a DC 32 Insight check to discern that the form is a disguise.</p>]] 改变形态 Change Change Shape (polymorph) ✦ 随意 polymorph

效果：该变形怪改变其物理形态为一个中型类人生物直到它再次使用改变形态或直到它生命值降到 0。要变成一个特定个体的形态，该变形怪必须见过该个体。其他生物可以通过一次 DC32 的洞察检定来识破该形态是伪装的。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Replica Switch</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The doppelganger must be adjacent to an enemy affected by its perfect replica</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> A melee or ranged attack from an enemy unaffected by the doppelganger’s perfect replica targets the doppelganger.</p><p><i>Effect (Opportunity Action):</i> The doppelganger and the enemy affected by its perfect replica swap places, and the triggering attack instead targets the enemy affected by the doppelganger’s perfect replica.</p>]] 拷贝交换 Replica Replica Switch ✦ 随意

前提：该变形怪必须邻接一个受其完美拷贝影响的敌人。

触发：一个不受该变形怪的完美拷贝影响的敌人的一次近战或远程攻击以该变形怪为目标。

效果（借机动作）：该变形怪和那个受其完美拷贝影响的敌人交换位置，且触发的攻击的目标改为这个受该变形怪的完美拷贝影响的敌人。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Variable Resistance</b> ✦ <b>3/Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The abomination takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The abomination gains resist 20 to the triggering 伤害 type until the end of the encounter or until it uses variable resistance again.</p>]] 可变抗性 Variable Variable Resistance ✦ 3/Encounter

触发：该魔裔卓尔憎恶者受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：该魔裔卓尔憎恶者获得 20 点触发伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束或直到它再次使用可变抗性。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Dark Leap</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy damages the abomination.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> Maddening darkness recharges, and the abomination uses it. The abomination then teleports 8 squares.</p>]] 暗跃 Dark Dark Leap (teleportation) ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

触发：一个敌人伤害该魔裔卓尔憎恶者。

效果（直觉反应）：疯狂黑暗充能，且该魔裔卓尔憎恶者使用它。然后该魔裔卓尔憎恶者瞬移 8 格。

Claw.name: 爪击 Claw
Claw.description:
爪击 Claw

攻击：近战 3（一个生物）+29 vs. AC

命中：2d10+10 伤害，对晕眩的生物则为 4d10+10 伤害。

效果：该魔裔卓尔憎恶者对两个不同的目标各进行一次爪击攻击。

Tethering Web.name: 网缚 Tethering Web
Tethering Web.description:
网缚 Tethering Web

远程：网缚（毒素）·随意

攻击：射程 5（一个生物，当该魔裔卓尔憎恶者重伤时则为两个生物）+27 vs. 反射

命中：1d10+10 毒素伤害，且目标被捆缚（豁免终止）。在目标被捆缚期间，它晕眩，且该魔裔卓尔憎恶者在该魔裔卓尔憎恶者的回合可以以一个自由动作拉动目标到一个邻接它的格子。

Maddening Darkness.name: 疯狂黑暗 Maddening Darkness

疯狂黑暗 Maddening Darkness

命中：目标迟缓并晕眩直到该魔裔卓尔憎恶者下回合结束。

效果：该爆发生成一个结界持续直到该魔裔卓尔憎恶者下回合结束。该结界阻挡该魔裔卓尔憎恶者以外所有生物的视线。该魔裔卓尔憎恶者以外的任何生物在该结界内时目盲。

触发：该魔裔卓尔憎恶者受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：该魔裔卓尔憎恶者获得 20 点触发伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束或直到它再次使用可变抗性。

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Skirmish</b> <b></b></p><p>If the dragonborn ends a move on its turn at least 4 squares from where it started the move, it deals 1d6 extra 伤害 with melee attacks until the start of its next turn.</p>]] 游击 Skirmish

如果该龙裔在其回合在离它开始移动的地方结束一次移动，则它的近战攻击造成 1d6 额外伤害直到其下回合开始。 [[/roll 1d6 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Skirmish</b> <b></b></p><p>If the dragonborn ends a move on its turn at least 4 squares from where it started the move, it deals 1d6 extra 伤害 with melee attacks until the start of its next turn.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Battleaxe</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +7 vs. AC, or +8 vs. AC while the dragonborn is 重伤</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d10 + 4 伤害, and the dragonborn shifts up to 2 squares.</p>]] (⚔) 战斧 Battleaxe (weapon) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+7 vs. AC（在该龙裔重伤时则为+8 vs. AC） [[/roll 1d10 + 4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Battleaxe</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d10 + 4 伤害, and the dragonborn shifts up to 2 squares.</p>]]

命中：1d10+4 伤害，且该龙裔快步最多两格。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Overwhelming Strike</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +7 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10 + 4 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d10 + 4#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Overwhelming Strike</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10 + 4 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Dragon Breath</b> (lightning) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 3 (creatures in the blast); +5 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 2 lightning 伤害.</p>]] ᗕ 龙息 Dragon Dragon Breath (lightning) ✦ 遭遇

攻击：近程冲击 3（范围内所有生物）+5 vs. 反射 [[/roll 1d6 + 2#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Dragon Breath</b> (lightning) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 2 lightning 伤害.</p>]]

命中：1d6+2 闪电伤害。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Tactical Withdrawal</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The dragonborn is 重伤.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The dragonborn shifts up to 3 squares.</p>]] 战术撤退 Tactical Tactical Withdrawal ✦ 遭遇

触发：该龙裔处于重伤。

效果（直觉反应）：该龙裔快步最多三格。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Widow Counterattack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy would provoke an opportunity attack from the demonic spider created by the Lady of Spiders.</p><p><i>Attack (Opportunity Action):</i> Melee 1 (the triggering enemy); +32 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 伤害, and 持续 10 poison 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]] ⚔ 寡妇反击 Widow Widow Counterattack ✦ 随意

命中：2d8+9 伤害，以及 10 点持续毒素伤害（豁免终止）。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Fearsome Wrath</b> (fear) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy hits the Lady of Spiders with a melee attack.</p><p><i>Attack (Immediate Reaction):</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast, which must include the triggering enemy); +31 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The Lady of Spiders pushes 目标 5 squares, and 目标 is 震慑 until the end of its next turn.</p>]] ᗕ 恐怖盛怒 Fearsome Fearsome Wrath (fear) ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

攻击（直觉反应）：近程冲击 5（冲击内所有敌人，必须包括触发的敌人）+31vs.意志

命中：该卓尔蜘蛛女士推动目标 5 格，且目标震慑直到其下回合结束。

Lolth's Blessings.name: 罗丝的祝福 Lolth's Blessings
Lolth's Blessings.description:
罗丝的祝福 Lolth's Blessings

灵气：罗丝的祝福（医疗）·灵气 2

任何在该灵气内开始回合的重伤的恶魔、卓尔或蜘蛛盟友恢复 10 点生命值。

Sensitive to Light.name: 对光敏感 Sensitive to Light
Sensitive to Light.description:
对光敏感 Sensitive to Light

每当该卓尔蜘蛛女士受到光耀伤害时，其罗丝的祝福灵气失效直到其下回合结束。

Scourge.description:
多头鞭 Scourge

命中：目标选择受到 50 点心灵伤害或是对一个由该卓尔蜘蛛女士指定的生物进行冲锋。

Bring Forth the Widows.name: 创造寡妇 Bring Forth the Widows
Bring Forth the Widows.description:
创造寡妇 Bring Forth the Widows

远程：创造寡妇（毒素）·充能（当生成的恶魔蜘蛛生命值降到 0 时）

效果：该卓尔蜘蛛女士在其 10 格内的一个不被占据的格子生成一个中型的恶魔蜘蛛。该恶魔蜘蛛占据一个格子且持续直到遭遇结束或直到其生命值降到 0。该恶魔蜘蛛拥有 100 点生命值且使用该卓尔蜘蛛女士的防御。该恶魔蜘蛛拥有速度 8 和攀爬 8（蛛行），且它可以在该卓尔蜘蛛女士进行一个移动动作的时候移动其速度的格数。该恶魔蜘蛛必须保持在固体表面上。

Drow Shadowblade.description:
生命值 171; 重伤 85先攻 +24
AC 39Fort 34Ref 37Will 36
速度 7; phasing
属性力量 16 (+15)
体质 21 (+17)		敏捷 27 (+20)
智力 22 (+18)		感知 24 (+19)
魅力 19 (+16)
语言 Common, Elven, Abyssal
阵营 Chaotic Evil
技能 Acrobatics +25, Stealth +25, Thievery +25感官 黑暗视觉
被动 侦查 29 | 洞察 29

装备 leather armor , short sword .

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Short Sword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +29 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 15 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 短剑 Short Short Sword (weapon) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+29 vs. AC [[/roll 2d6 + 15#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Short Sword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 15 伤害.</p>]]

命中：2d6+15 伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Shadow Strike</b> (necrotic, weapon, zone) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature flanked by the shadowblade and its animated shadow); +29 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 15 伤害 plus 10 necrotic 伤害, and the animated shadow ends and creates a zone in a close burst 2 centered on its square and including its square. The zone lasts until the end of the shadowblade’s next turn. The zone blocks line of sight for all creatures except the shadowblade. Any creature other than the shadowblade is 目盲 while within the zone.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d6 + 15#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Shadow Strike</b> (necrotic, weapon, zone) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 15 伤害 plus 10 necrotic 伤害, and the animated shadow ends and creates a zone in a close burst 2 centered on its square and including its square. The zone lasts until the end of the shadowblade’s next turn. The zone blocks line of sight for all creatures except the shadowblade. Any creature other than the shadowblade is 目盲 while within the zone.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Animated Shadow</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when the shadowblade"s animated shadow ends</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The shadowblade creates an animated shadow in an unoccupied square within 10 squares of it. The shadow lasts until the end of the shadowblade’s next turn. The shadow counts as an ally for the purpose of flanking with the shadowblade. When the shadowblade moves on its turn, it slides the shadow an equal number of squares.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Soulrot Venom</b> (necrotic, poison) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The next enemy the shadowblade hits before the end of the encounter is 虚弱 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>First Failed Saving Throw:</i> The enemy takes 持续 15 necrotic and poison 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Second Failed Saving Throw:</i> The enemy cannot benefit from immunities or resistances （豁免终止）.</p>]] 蚀魂毒 Soulrot Soulrot Venom (necrotic, poison) ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

效果：在遭遇结束前下一个被该卓尔影刃手命中的敌人虚弱（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：该敌人受到 15 点持续黯蚀和毒素伤害（豁免终止）。

第二次豁免失败时：该敌人不能从免疫或抗性获得增益（豁免终止）。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Persistent Blade</b> ✦ Recharge ⚃ ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The shadowblade misses an enemy with a melee attack.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The shadowblade uses short sword against a different enemy.</p>]] ⚔ 连环刃 Persistent Persistent Blade ✦ Recharge ⚃ ⚄ ⚅

触发：该卓尔影刃手对一个敌人的一次近战攻击失手。

效果（自由动作）：该卓尔影刃手对一个不同的敌人进行一次短剑攻击。

AC 25Fort 20Ref 25Will 23
速度 8

体质 14 (+7)		敏捷 23 (+11)

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Residuum Recovery</b> <b></b></p><p>A dweomer eater consumes any item it destroys. The residuum from any magic items the dweomer eater has destroyed can be retrieved from its stomach. The residuum is worth the full market value of the item.</p>]] 魔尘回收 Residuum Residuum Recovery

食魔者会消化任何被它摧毁的物品。来自被食魔者摧毁的魔法物品的魔尘可以在该食魔者的胃中回收。这些魔尘等价于该物品的市场价格（而不是价格的五分之一）。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +16 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 11 伤害, and any magic armor 目标 is wearing is decaying. Each time the dweomer eater renders armor decaying, the armor’s enhancement bonus is reduced by 1, to a minimum of 0. The enhancement bonus returns to normal at the end of the encounter.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite ✦ 随意

标准动作 [[/roll 2d6 + 11#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 11 伤害, and any magic armor 目标 is wearing is decaying. Each time the dweomer eater renders armor decaying, the armor’s enhancement bonus is reduced by 1, to a minimum of 0. The enhancement bonus returns to normal at the end of the encounter.</p>]]

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）；+16 vs. AC [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Dissolve Item</b> ✦ Recharge ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature wearing or wielding a decaying magic item of 15th level or lower); +14 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The decaying magic item is destroyed.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> The power is not expended.</p>]]

命中：2d6+11 伤害，且如果目标穿着魔法护甲，则该盔甲生锈直到遭遇结束。在该盔甲生锈期间，该盔甲的增强加值受到-1 减值（可累计），最多累计到该护甲的增强加值减完。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Magic Consumption</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The dweomer eater is hit by an attack that uses a magic implement or magic weapon.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The implement or weapon used in the triggering attack is decaying. Each time a dweomer eater renders an item decaying, the item’s enhancement bonus is reduced by 1, to a minimum of 0. The enhancement bonus returns to normal at the end of the encounter.</p>]] 魔法消化 Magic Magic Consumption ✦ 随意

触发动作

触发：该食魔者被一次使用魔法法器或武器的攻击命中。

效果（自由动作）：用于触发的攻击的法器或武器生锈直到遭遇结束。在该法器或武器生锈期间，该法器或武器的增强加值受到-1 减值（可累计），最多累计到该物品的增强加值减完。

[[/roll 4d6 + 6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d6 + 6 伤害.</p>]]

At the start of its following turn, the dragon makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack (No Action):</i> Close burst 5 (enemies in the burst); +22 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 9 伤害, and 目标 falls prone and cannot stand up （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The quaking earth aura reverts to its original state and size (aura 1).</p>]] ᗕ 震颤增幅 Rising Rising Tremors ✦ 充能 at the start of any turn when quaking earth is aura 1

行动恢复 Action Recovery

特性

每当该龙回合结束时，其身上任何晕眩、震慑或受控效果终止。

Instinctive Assault.name: 本能突袭 Instinctive Assault
Instinctive Assault.description:
本能突袭 Instinctive Assault

特性

在 10+该龙先攻检定值的先攻序位，该龙可以使用一个自由动作来使用啮咬或爪击。如果该龙因为受控或震慑效果不能使用自由动作来进行该攻击，则作为该龙进行该攻击的代替，那效果终止。

啮咬 Bite

If it ends that turn in direct sunlight, it turns to ash and is destroyed.</p>]] 毁灭阳光 Destroyed by Destroyed by Sunlight

每当该吸血鬼在阳光直射的地方开始回合，它在其回合只能进行一个移动动作。如果它在阳光直射的地方结束该回合，则它将化为灰烬并摧毁。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +15 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 8 伤害, and the vampire grabs 目标 (挣脱 DC 18) if it does not have a creature 攫抓.</p>]] (⚔) 爪击 Claw ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature 攫抓 by the vampire); +15 vs. AC. If 目标 is 晕眩, the attack hits automatically</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 10 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 until the grab ends.</p>]] ⚔ 啮咬 Bite ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个被该吸血鬼擒抱的生物）+15 vs. AC（若目标处于晕眩，则该攻击必然命中）

命中：10 点伤害，且目标晕眩直到该擒抱结束。

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+24 vs. AC [[/roll 3d10 + 5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (fire) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 5 伤害, and 持续 10 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Growing Heat</b> (fire) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> at the start of any turn when noxious fumes is aura 1</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The noxious fumes expands to aura 3. At the start of the dragon’s next turn, the noxious fumes expands to aura 5. Any creature that enters the zone or starts its turn there takes 15 fire 伤害.</p>]]

命中：3d10+4 火焰伤害，以及 10 点持续火焰伤害（豁免终止）。效果：毒烟灵气恢复为原来的状态和大小（灵气 1）。

触发动作

本能狂暴 Instinctive Rampage

特性

在 10+该龙先攻检定值的先攻序位，该龙可以以一个自由动作移动最多其速度。该龙在该移动中可以移动穿过敌人的空间且获得 5 点全伤害抗性。每当该龙在该移动中首次进入一个敌人的空间时，它可以对该敌人使用爪击。如果该攻击命中，则目标倒地。如果该龙因受控或震慑效果无法使用一个自由动作来进行该移动，则作为该龙进行该移动的代替，那效果终止。

Savage Blood.description:
野性血统 Savage Blood

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Hydra Fury</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The hydra attacks a number of times equal to the number of heads it currently has, using either bite or flame kiss for each attack. If it cannot move at least half its speed, it grants 战斗优势 until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 原始恐惧 Primal Primal Fear

当该魔像受到来自攻击的火焰伤害的时候，它以一个自由动作来移动最多其速度，且它移动的每一格都必须使它远离攻击者。如果它不移动至少其速度一半，则它提供战斗优势直到其下回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Life-Giving Jolt</b> <b></b></p><p>When the golem takes lightning 伤害, it can make a basic attack as a free action.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +17 vs. AC, or +19 vs. AC while the golem is 重伤</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 9 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 击打 Slam ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Golem Rampage</b> ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The golem moves up to its speed + 2. The geonid slides a creature it has 攫抓 into its space. The 攫抓 creature has line of sight and line of effect only to the geonid. The geonid does not gain its bonus to defenses against the 攫抓 creature. If the 攫抓 creature escapes, it appears in a space adjacent to the geonid. The geonid can open its shell as a minor action.</p>]] ᗕ 外壳猛击 Shell Shell Slam ✦ 随意

Determine which ray it uses by rolling a d4, rerolling the die on a result of 4.</p>]]

效果（自由动作）：该幽魂眼魔对触发的敌人使用眼魔射线。通过投 d4 来决定它使用哪种射线，如果投到 4 则重投。

远程：眼魔射线·随意

效果：该幽魂眼魔使用下列眼魔射线中的一个，不会引发借机攻击。

1.阴寒射线（寒冷，黯蚀）

攻击：射程 10（一个生物）；+21vs.强韧

命中：4d8+8 寒冷和黯蚀伤害，且目标迟缓（豁免终止）。首次豁免失败时：目标改迟缓为定身（豁免终止）。

2.鬼上身射线（心灵）

攻击：射程 10（一个生物）+21vs.意志

命中：15 点持续心灵伤害（豁免终止）。首次豁免失败时：除了持续伤害，目标还会晕眩（豁免终止两者）。第二次豁免失败时：目标改晕眩为受控且继续受到持续伤害（豁免终止两者）。该幽魂眼魔除出游戏直到该效果终止。当该效果终止时，该幽魂眼魔出现在该目标 10 格内的一个不被占据的空间。该幽魂眼魔可以以一个自由动作终止该效果。

3.自杀射线（心灵）

攻击：射程 10（一个生物）+21vs.意志

命中：1d8+9 心灵伤害，且目标以一个自由动作对它自己进行一次近战基本攻击。如果目标没有持用近战武器，则它扔下持握的一件物品并以一个自由动作抽出一件近战武器然后进行该攻击。

Whenever an attack using a metal weapon hits the rust monster, the weapon used in the attack is rusting until the end of the encounter. While the weapon is rusting, attacks with the weapon take a -1 penalty to attack rolls. RustingDefense.name: 锈蚀防御 Rusting Defense
RustingDefense.description:
锈蚀防御 Rusting Defense

特性

每当一次使用金属武器的攻击命中该锈蚀怪时，用于该攻击的武器生锈直到遭遇结束。在该武器生锈期间，通过该武器进行攻击攻击骰受到-1减值。若用来攻击该锈蚀怪的武器已经生锈，则对攻击骰的减值再恶化1点（该减值最多累计到-5）。

命中：3d10+3伤害。若目标穿着重甲，则该护甲生锈直到遭遇结束。在该护甲生锈期间，目标AC受到-1减值。若目标穿着的护甲已经生锈，则对AC的减值再增加1点（该减值最多累计到-5）。

攻击：近战1（一个穿着或持用生锈物品的生物）+11 vs. 反射

命中：该生锈物品被摧毁。若该物品是魔法物品，则在该锈蚀怪被杀死之后可以在其体内搜出等价于该物品市场价值的魔尘。

命中：4d10+8伤害。若目标穿着重甲，则该护甲生锈直到遭遇结束。在该护甲生锈期间，目标AC受到-1减值。若目标穿着的护甲已经生锈，则对AC的减值再增加1点（该减值最多累计到-5）。此外，目标持用的任何武器生锈直到遭遇结束，在该武器生锈期间，通过该武器进行的攻击的攻击骰受到-1减值。若该武器已经生锈，则对攻击骰的减值再恶化1点（该减值最多累计到-5）。

While in this form, it is 虚体 and has vulnerable 5 radiant. In addition, it can make Stealth checks to become hidden if it has any cover or concealment.</p><p><i>Sustain Minor:</i> The shadowy form persists until the end of the gnome’s next turn.</p>]] 阴影形态 Shade Shade Form ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

该灵气内的敌人不能从火焰抗性获得增益且不能对带有持续火焰伤害的效果进行豁免。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Fiery Claw</b> (fire) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +31 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> Ongoing 20 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]] (⚔) 燃炎爪 Fiery Fiery Claw (fire) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+31vs.AC [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Fire Bolt</b> (fire) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one or two creatures); +31 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> Ongoing 25 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Godsbane Inferno</b> (fire) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Area burst 2 within 10 (enemies in the burst); +31 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10+5 fire 伤害, and 持续 15 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Aftereffect:</i> Ongoing 10 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d10+5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Godsbane Inferno</b> (fire) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d10+5 fire 伤害, and 持续 15 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Unfettered Apocalypse</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy scores a critical hit against the inferno or the inferno is first 重伤.</p><p><i>Effect (No Action):</i> The inferno creates a duplicate of itself, which appears in the nearest unoccupied square. The duplicate has the same hit points as the inferno, is considered to have expended the same powers as the inferno, and acts during the inferno’s turn. Any effects on the inferno do not transfer to the duplicate. At the end of the inferno’s next turn, the duplicate disappears.</p>]] 解放天启 Unfettered Unfettered Apocalypse ✦ 遭遇

触发：一个敌人对该弑神者炼狱造成重击或该弑神者炼狱首次重伤。

效果（无动作）：该弑神者炼狱创造一个其自身的分身，该分身出现在最近的不被占据的格子。该分身拥有与该弑神者炼狱相同的生命值，被视为与该弑神者炼狱消耗掉了同样的威能，且在该弑神者炼狱的回合行动。该弑神者炼狱身上的任何效果都不会带到分身身上。在该弑神者炼狱下回合结束时，该分身消失。

该灵气内的敌人不能从火焰抗性获得增益且不能对带有持续火焰伤害的效果进行豁免。

Unfettered Apocalypse.name: 解放天启 Unfettered Apocalypse
Unfettered Apocalypse.description:
解放天启 Unfettered Apocalypse

解放天启·遭遇

触发：一个敌人对该弑神者炼狱造成重击或该弑神者炼狱首次重伤。

效果（无动作）：该弑神者炼狱创造一个其自身的分身，该分身出现在最近的不被占据的格子。该分身拥有与该弑神者炼狱相同的生命值，被视为与该弑神者炼狱消耗掉了同样的威能，且在该弑神者炼狱的回合行动。该弑神者炼狱身上的任何效果都不会带到分身身上。在该弑神者炼狱下回合结束时，该分身消失。

次要维持：该史拉金蟾维持其所有的擒抱，且每个被该史拉金蟾擒抱的生物受到 2d6+8 强酸伤害。每有一个该史拉金蟾擒抱的生物该史拉金蟾便恢复 5 点生命值。

Bite.name: 啮咬 Bite
Bite.description:
啮咬 Bite

基本近战：啮咬·随意

命中：2d10+13 伤害。如果该攻击掷骰是奇数，则该史拉金蟾滑移目标 3 格。如果该攻击掷骰是偶数，则目标晕眩直到该史拉金蟾下回合结束。

Chaos Croak.name: 混沌蛙鸣 Chaos Croak
Chaos Croak.description:
混沌蛙鸣 Chaos Croak

近程：混沌蛙鸣（疾病，心灵）·充能 5,6

攻击：近程爆发 5（爆发内所有敌人）+23 vs. 意志

命中：2d6+8 心灵伤害。为每个目标投一个 d6 来决定一个额外的效果。

1.目标往一个随机的方向（投一个 d8 来决定方向）瞬移 1d6 格。

2.目标以一个自由动作对邻接它的一个随机的生物进行一次近战基本攻击。

3.目标震慑直到其下回合结束。

4.目标迟缓（豁免终止）。

5.目标受到 10 点随机类型的伤害。投一个 d10：(1)强酸，(2)寒冷，(3)火焰，(4)力场，(5)闪电，(6)黯蚀，(7)毒素，(8)心灵，(9)光耀，(10)雷鸣。

6.目标暴露在混沌噬菌体之下。此外，如果目标正因该史拉金蟾的啮咬而晕眩，则它变成晕眩（豁免终止）。

The invisibility lasts until the end of its next turn or until it attacks.</p>]] 风中幻影 Phantom on the Phantom on the Wind

该高等气元素每当在没有邻接敌人的情况下开始回合时便变成隐形。该隐形持续直到其下回合结束或直到它攻击。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +25 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 8 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 击打 Slam ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+25 vs. AC [[/roll 3d10 + 8#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 8 伤害.</p>]]

命中：3d10+8 伤害。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Engulfing Winds</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature that can’t see the elemental); +23 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The elemental slides 目标 1 square into its space, and 目标 is 攫抓. Until the grab ends, 目标 is 晕眩 and takes 持续 20 伤害. When the elemental moves, the 攫抓 creature moves with it, remaining in the elemental’s space. The elemental moves at full speed while it has a creature 攫抓, and it need not spend a standard action or make an attack roll to move a 攫抓 creature.</p>]] ⚔ 吞没之风 Engulfing Engulfing Winds ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个看不见该高等气元素的生物）+23 vs. 强韧

命中：该高等气元素滑移目标 1 格到其空间内，且目标被擒抱。直到该擒抱终止，目标晕眩且受到 20 点持续伤害。当该高等气元素移动时，该被擒抱的目标也随着它一同移动，保持在该高等气元素的空间内。该高等气元素在有擒抱生物的时候可以以完整的速度移动，且它不需要花费标准动作或进行攻击骰来移动被擒抱的生物。

The devil does not provoke an opportunity attack for moving away from 目标 of the attacks.</p>]] (⚔) 爪刃穿刺 Talon Talon Skewer ✦ 随意

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Caress of Flame</b> (fire, force) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +32 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 19 fire and force 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 火焰之拥 Caress of Caress of Flame (fire, force) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+32 vs. AC [[/roll 3d10 + 19#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Caress of Flame</b> (fire, force) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 19 fire and force 伤害.</p>]]

The herald cannot target the same creature with both attacks.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 1 (enemies in the burst); +30 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d10+16 fire and force 伤害, and 持续 15 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 4d10+16#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Storm of Colorless Fire</b> (fire, force) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d10+16 fire and force 伤害, and 持续 15 fire 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Flickering Flame</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The herald shifts 4 squares.</p>]] 闪烁火焰 Flickering Flickering Flame ✦ 随意

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Unfettered Apocalypse</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy scores a critical hit against the herald or the herald is first 重伤.</p><p><i>Effect (No Action):</i> The herald creates a duplicate of itself, which appears in the nearest unoccupied square. The duplicate has the same hit points as the herald, is considered to have expended the same powers as the herald, and acts during the herald’s turn. Any effects on the herald do not transfer to the duplicate. At the end of the herald’s next turn, the duplicate disappears.</p>]] 解放天启 Unfettered Unfettered Apocalypse ✦ 遭遇

触发：一个敌人对该苍炎先行者造成重击或该苍炎先行者首次重伤。

效果（无动作）：该苍炎先行者创造一个其自身的分身，该分身出现在最近的不被占据的格子。该分身拥有与该苍炎先行者相同的生命值，被视为与该苍炎先行者消耗掉了同样的威能，且在该苍炎先行者的回合行动。该苍炎先行者身上的任何效果都不会带到分身身上。在该苍炎先行者下回合结束时，该分身消失。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Hadar"s Hunger</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> A creature within 5 squares of the herald spends a healing surge.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The herald chooses one of the following options.</p><p><i>1:</i> The herald shifts up to 3 squares but must end the move closer to the triggering creature.</p><p><i>2:</i> The herald uses hungry claws.</p><p><i>3:</i> The herald recharges one of its encounter powers.</p><p><i>4:</i> The herald gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls until the end of its next turn.</p>]] Hadar"s Hunger ✦ 随意

触发： A creature within 5 squares of the herald spends a healing surge.

Effect (Immediate Reaction): The herald chooses one of the following options.

1: The herald shifts up to 3 squares but must end the move closer to the triggering creature.

2: The herald uses hungry claws.

3: The herald recharges one of its encounter powers.

4: The herald gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Rotting Caress</b> (disease, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +21 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 4 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is exposed to touch of Kyuss.</p>]] (⚔) 腐烂之拥 Rotting Rotting Caress (disease, necrotic) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Writhing Pronouncement</b> (disease, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 20 (one creature); +21 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 necrotic 伤害, and 持续 5 necrotic 伤害 （豁免终止）. In addition, 目标 is exposed to touch of Kyuss.</p><p><i>First Failed Saving Throw:</i> The ongoing 伤害 increases to 10, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Second Failed Saving Throw:</i> The ongoing 伤害 increases to 15, and 目标 is 震慑 instead of 晕眩 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Special:</i> The corpse of any humanoid killed by this attack becomes a wretch of Kyuss at the start of the herald of Kyuss’s next turn. The wretch must be destroyed before the creature can be raised.</p>]] ➶ 缠绕宣告 Writhing Writhing Pronouncement (disease, necrotic) ✦ 随意

攻击：射程 20（一个生物）+21vs.强韧 [[/roll 2d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Writhing Pronouncement</b> (disease, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 necrotic 伤害, and 持续 5 necrotic 伤害 （豁免终止）. In addition, 目标 is exposed to touch of Kyuss.</p>]]

首次豁免失败时：该持续伤害增加到 10 点，且目标晕眩（豁免终止两者）。

第二次豁免失败时：该持续伤害增加到 15 点，且目标改晕眩为震慑（豁免终止两者）。

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Shadow Hex</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> One creature within 3 squares of the hex knight is marked until the end of the encounter or until the hex knight uses shadow hex again. While the creature is marked by the hex knight, whenever it makes an attack that does not include the hex knight as a target, it grants 战斗优势 until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 暗影妖术 Shadow Shadow Hex ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Shadow Grasp</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 10 (one or two creatures); +30 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 9 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The weaver is 隐形 to 目标 until the end of the weaver’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 暗影缠缚 Shadow Shadow Grasp ✦ 随意

The attack deals 20 extra 伤害 if 目标 is granting 战斗优势 to the weaver.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Shadow Mask</b> (illusion) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The weaver becomes 隐形 until the end of its next turn.</p>]]

命中：2d10+9 伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Extract Shadow Soul</b> (healing, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The weaver must be holding a chromatic disk.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one 重伤 creature that has shadow powers); +30 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The weaver ends one condition currently affecting it.</p>]]

The weaver then teleports its speed.</p>]] 跃入暗影 Step into Step into Shadow (illusion, teleportation) ✦ Recharge ⚃ ⚄ ⚅

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Longsword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +13 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 7 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The duelist marks 目标 until the end of the swordsman’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 长剑 Longsword (weapon) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Volcanic Circle</b> (fire, zone) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Imix reduces a fire grue within 10 squares of him to 0 hit points and makes the following attack centered on the grue.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 1 (creatures in the burst); +35 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 6d6 + 19 fire 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The burst creates a zone that lasts until the end of the encounter. Any enemy that enters the zone or ends its turn there takes 20 fire 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 6d6 + 19#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Volcanic Circle</b> (fire, zone) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 6d6 + 19 fire 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Servants of Elemental Fire (fire)</b> (fire) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when no fire grue is within 10 squares of Imix at the start of his turn</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Imix creates four fire grues, or six while Imix is 重伤, each in an unoccupied square within 10 squares of him. The grues cannot take actions. Any creature that starts its turn adjacent to one or more grues takes 15 fire 伤害. The grues have defenses equal to Imix’s and 1 hit point each. A missed attack never damages a grue. Each grue lasts until the end of the encounter or until Imix ends his turn more than 10 squares from it. As a minor action, Imix can move each grue up to 6 squares.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Blinding Flare</b> (fire) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 10 (enemies adjacent to fire grues); +35 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 10 fire 伤害, and 目标 is 目盲 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害, and 目标 takes a -2 penalty to attack rolls until the end of Imix’s next turn.</p>]] ᗕ 眩目耀光 Blinding Blinding Flare (fire) ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

Each creature adjacent to at least one target takes 10 fire 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Call to Harvest</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one creature); +19 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The mimic slides 目标 4 squares, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 until the end of the mimic’s next turn.</p>]] ➶ 呼唤收割 Call to Call to Harvest (charm) ✦ 随意 1/round

攻击：射程 10（一个生物）+19 vs. 意志 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Shapeshift</b> (polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The mimic assumes one of the following forms. It can’t change its size. It remains in the chosen form until it uses this power again.</p><p><i>Ooze Form:</i> The mimic becomes an ooze. When it squeezes while it is in this form, it moves at full speed rather than half speed, it doesn’t take the -5 penalty to attack rolls, and it doesn’t grant 战斗优势 for squeezing.</p><p><i>Humanoid Form:</i> The mimic gains a +4 bonus to Bluff checks. In addition, it can use all the languages known by the last humanoid creature it killed.</p><p><i>Object Form:</i> While in this form, the mimic has resist 10 to all 伤害, is 定身, and cannot attack. In addition, a creature must succeed on a DC 31 Perception check to notice that the mimic is a living creature.</p>]]

命中：该模仿者拟形怪滑移目标 4 格，且目标提供战斗优势直到该模仿者拟形怪下回合结束。

自由动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Absorb</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The mimic can use absorb only during its turn.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The mimic reduces one mimic spawn that is adjacent to it or occupying its space (see the mimic spawn’s one with master power) to 0 hit points. When it does so, it gains 1 行动点.</p>]] 吸收 Absorb ✦ 随意 1/round

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Variable Resistance</b> ✦ <b>3/Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The klurichir takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The klurichir gains resist 30 to the triggering 伤害 type until the end of the encounter or until it uses variable resistance again.</p>]] 可变抗性 Variable Variable Resistance ✦ 3/Encounter

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Unfettered Apocalypse</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy scores a critical hit against the light of Amoth or the light of Amoth is first 重伤.</p><p><i>Effect (No Action):</i> The light of Amoth creates a duplicate of itself, which appears in the nearest unoccupied squares. The duplicate has the same hit points as the light of Amoth, is considered to have expended the same powers as the light of Amoth, and acts during the light of Amoth’s turn. Any effects on the light of Amoth do not transfer to the duplicate. At the end of the light of Amoth’s next turn, the duplicate disappears.</p>]] 解放天启 Unfettered Unfettered Apocalypse ✦ 遭遇

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Regeneration</b> <b></b></p><p>The vampire regains 10 hit points whenever it starts its turn and has at least 1 hit point. When the vampire takes radiant 伤害, its regeneration does not function on its next turn.</p>]] 再生 Regeneration

每当该吸血鬼开始回合且至少拥有 1 点生命值时它恢复 5 点生命值。当该吸血鬼受到光耀伤害时，它的再生在其下回合无效。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Cloud of Bats</b> (polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The vampire assumes the form of a cloud of bats until the start of its next turn. While in this form, the vampire cannot attack but becomes 虚体, gains 飞行 8 （盘旋）, gains a +5 power bonus to Stealth checks, and can move through enemies’ spaces.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>One with Master</b> <b></b></p><p>The mimic spawn can end its move in the same space as an impersonator mimic. Up to four mimic spawns can occupy an impersonator mimic’s space.</p>]] 与主同行 One with One with Master

该拟形怪衍体可以在与一个模仿者拟形怪相同的空间内结束其移动。在它占据一个模仿者拟形怪的空间期间，该拟形怪衍体随着模仿者拟形怪一同移动且不能进行攻击、成为目标或是受到伤害。最多能有四个拟形怪衍体占据同一个模仿者拟形怪的空间。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +21 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 12 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 击打 Slam ✦ 随意

命中：12 点伤害。

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Shapeshift</b> (polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The mimic assumes one of the following forms. It can’t change its size. It remains in the chosen form until it uses this power again.</p><p><i>Ooze Form:</i> The mimic becomes an ooze. When it squeezes while it is in this form, it moves at full speed rather than half speed, it doesn’t take the -5 penalty to attack rolls, and it doesn’t grant 战斗优势 for squeezing,</p><p><i>Object Form:</i> While in this form, the mimic has resist 10 to all 伤害, is 定身, and cannot attack. In addition, a creature must succeed on a DC 31 Perception check to notice that the mimic is a living creature.</p>]] 切换形态 Shapeshift (polymorph) ✦ 随意 1/round

切换形态（变形）·随意（一轮一次）

效果：该拟形怪衍体呈现下面的一种形态。它不能改变其体型。它保持所选的形态直到它再次使用该威能。

泥型形态：该拟形怪衍体变成一个泥型怪。当它在该形态下挤过时，它以完整的速度移动而不是一半速度。它不会因挤过而攻击骰受到-5 减值和提供战斗优势。

物体形态：在该形态下，该拟形怪衍体拥有 10 点全伤害抗性，处于定身，且不能攻击。此外，一个生物必须进行一次 DC31 的侦查检定成功才能注意到该拟形怪衍体是一个活体生物。

命中：3d6+13 伤害，且该夺心魔审判者擒抱目标。

Implant Delusions.description:
植入妄想 Implant Delusions

近战：植入妄想（魅惑，心灵）·随意

命中：3d8+15 心灵伤害，且目标开始蒙受妄想（豁免终止）。在目标蒙受妄想期间，邻接它的盟友的攻击骰受到-2 减值以及所有防御受到-2 减值。

Mind Blast.name: 精神冲击 Mind Blast

精神冲击 Mind Blast

命中：2d8+6 心灵伤害，且目标晕眩（豁免终止）。

失手：一半伤害。

Own Worst Enemy.name: 自我为敌 Own Worst Enemy
Own Worst Enemy.description:
自我为敌 Own Worst Enemy

自我为敌（魅惑）·充能（当首次重伤时）

效果：区域 10 爆发 2 内的每个敌人以一个自由动作对其自身使用一个由该夺心魔审判者选择的远程或近战随意攻击威能。

Unwilling Confession.name: 强迫忏悔 Unwilling Confession

强迫忏悔 Unwilling Confession

命中：目标晕眩，不能成为医疗威能的目标，且不会受提供豁免掷骰的威能的影响（豁免终止所有）。

Forceful Submission.name: 强制服从 Forceful Submission
Forceful Submission.description:
强制服从 Forceful Submission

强制服从·随意

触发：该夺心魔审判者看得见的一个敌人的一次豁免掷骰成功。

效果（直觉打断）：触发的敌人重新进行该豁免掷骰且受到-2 减值。

Mind Flayer Scourge.name: 夺心魔灾厄者 Mind Flayer Scourge
Mind Flayer Scourge.description:
生命值 199; 重伤 99
抗性 10 psychic 		先攻 +18
AC 35Fort 31Ref 34Will 33
速度 7
属性力量 20 (+15)
体质 23 (+16)		敏捷 23 (+16)

魅力 25 (+17)
语言 Deep Speech, telepathy 10
阵营 evil
感官 黑暗视觉
被动 侦查 26 | 洞察 26

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Mind Leech</b> <b></b></p><p>Whenever the mind flayer scourge starts its turn with a creature 攫抓, the scourge can make a 豁免检定 or an extra recharge roll. It can recharge psychic assault but must roll a 6 on the recharge roll.</p>]] 精神吸收 Mind Mind Leech

每当该夺心魔灾厄者在擒抱一个生物的情况下开始回合时，该夺心魔灾厄者可以进行一次豁免掷骰或是一次额外的充能骰。它可以充能心灵袭击不过必须在充能骰投到6。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Tentacles</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The scourge must not have a creature 攫抓.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +24 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 伤害, and the scourge grabs 目标. Until the grab ends, 目标 is 晕眩.</p>]] (⚔) 触手 Tentacles ✦ 随意

前提：该夺心魔灾厄者必须没有擒抱生物。攻击：近战1（一个生物）+24 vs. 反射 [[/roll 2d8 + 5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Tentacles</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 伤害, and the scourge grabs 目标. Until the grab ends, 目标 is 晕眩.</p>]]

命中：2d8+5伤害，且该夺心魔灾厄者擒抱目标。直到该擒抱终止，目标晕眩。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Mind Blast</b> (psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast); +24 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d8 + 5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Mind Blast</b> (psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Psychic Assault</b> (charm) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature 攫抓 by the scourge); +24 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d8 + 5 伤害, and 目标 is 受控 (save ends; 目标 takes a -4 penalty to the 豁免检定).</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害, and 目标 is 受控 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 1d8 + 5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Psychic Assault</b> (charm) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d8 + 5 伤害, and 目标 is 受控 (save ends; 目标 takes a -4 penalty to the 豁免检定).</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Alter Reality</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The scourge teleports a creature adjacent to it 2 squares.</p>]] 改变现实 Alter Alter Reality (teleportation) ✦ 随意

效果：该夺心魔灾厄者瞬移一个邻接它的生物2格。

触发动作

The mind flayer teleports up to 5 squares and teleports 目标 to the square it vacated. 大脑控制 Manipulate Brain

食脑（医疗）：目标死亡，且该夺心魔恢复 20 点生命值。

奴隶改造（魅惑）：代替生命值降到 0 或更低，目标的生命值残存 1 点。它受控直到该夺心魔死亡。

特性

任何在该灵气内开始回合的敌人迟缓且不能瞬移直到其下回合开始。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>All-Around Vision </b> <b></b></p><p>Enemies can’t gain 战斗优势 by flanking the molydeus. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Double Actions </b> <b></b></p><p>The molydeus rolls initiative twice and takes its turn on both results. It regains the use of its immediate action at the start of each turn. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Dual Brain </b> <b></b></p><p>At the end of each of its turns, the molydeus automatically saves against dazing or stunning effects that a save can end, and against any charm effect that a save can end.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Battleaxe</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +34 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d10 + 15 伤害, and 目标 is marked until the end of its next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 基本近战：战斧 Battleaxe (weapon) ✦ 随意

命中：4d10+15 伤害，目标被标记直到其下回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Wolf Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +34 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 19 伤害, and the molydeus slides 目标 6 squares to a square adjacent to the molydeus.</p>]]

[[/roll 4d8 + 19#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Wolf Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 19 伤害, and the molydeus slides 目标 6 squares to a square adjacent to the molydeus.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Snake Bite</b> (poison) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 3 (one creature); +34 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 10 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 and takes 持续 20 poison 伤害 （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

[[/roll 1d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Snake Bite</b> (poison) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 10 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 and takes 持续 20 poison 伤害 （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Dread Word</b> (fear) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 5 (enemies in the burst); +32 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> The target is 迟缓 and takes a -2 penalty to attack rolls （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Variable Resistance</b> ✦ <b>3/Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The molydeus takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The molydeus gains resist 30 to the triggering 伤害 type until the end of the encounter or until it uses variable resistance again.</p>]] 可变抗性 Variable Variable Resistance ✦ 3/Encounter

触发：该莫里迪乌斯魔受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：该莫里迪乌斯魔获得 30 点触发的伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束或直到它再次使用可变抗性。

该苔藓人爬行者对任何提供战斗优势给它的生物造成 2 点额外伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Mindmaster’s Thrall </b> <b></b></p><p>If the creeper was created by an oblivion moss mindmaster, it acts immediately after its creator’s turn.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Tendril Strike</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +17 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 10 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The creeper shifts 2 squares.</p>]] (⚔) 触须打击 Tendril Tendril Strike ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+17 vs. AC [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Simulacrum Attack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> When the creeper first acts during the encounter, choose one at-will melee attack power belonging to an enemy that the creeper can see. If the creeper was created by an oblivion moss mindmaster, choose one at-will melee attack power belonging to the enemy that the mindmaster hit to create the creeper.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +17 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target takes 伤害 and is subject to effects as though it were hit by the chosen attack. The 伤害 roll uses the ability score modifier of the creature from whom the power was chosen. The 伤害 does not include any bonuses or penalties to the 伤害 roll that the owner of the power might have. In addition, the creeper gains any benefits from the power’s Hit entry, using the ability score modifiers of the creature from whom the power was chosen but not including any bonuses or penalties.</p>]]

命中：10 点伤害。

效果：该苔藓人爬行者快步 2 格。

物体形态：在该形态下，该物体拟形怪拥有 10 点全伤害抗性，处于定身，且不能攻击。此外，一个生物必须进行一次 DC24 的侦查检定成功才能注意到该物体拟形怪是一个活体生物。

Ogrémoch.name: 欧雷莫奇 Ogrémoch
Ogrémoch.description:
生命值 1244; 重伤 622
免疫 disease, poison, sleep 		先攻 +24 | 行动点 3 | 豁免 +5
AC 50Fort 48Ref 45Will 47
速度 8 (earth walk), 掘穴 8, 攀爬 8

感官 黑暗视觉 , tremorsense 20
被动 侦查 36 | 洞察 36

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⌀ <b>Jagged Earth</b> ✦ <b>Aura</b> 5</p><p>Squares within the aura are difficult terrain. The first time any creature enters a square within the aura during its turn, it must succeed on a DC 32 Athletics or Acrobatics check or take 20 伤害. Creatures that have earth walk ignore the aura’s effects. </p>]] ⌀ 崎岖大地 Jagged Jagged Earth ✦ 灵气 5

该灵气内的格子是困难地形。任何生物在其回合中首次进入该灵气内的一个格子时，它必须进行一次 DC32 的运动或杂技检定成功否则受到 20 点伤害。拥有大地行者的生物无视该灵气的效果。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Earthbound</b> <b></b></p><p>While standing on a solid surface, Ogrémoch can ignore forced movement and cannot be 倒地. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Earth Glide </b> <b></b></p><p>Ogrémoch can pass through earth and rock as if it were phasing.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 4 (one creature); +39 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 24 伤害, and 每个敌人 adjacent to 目标 is 晕眩 until the end of Ogrémoch’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 击打 Slam ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 4（一个生物）+39vs.AC [[/roll 4d8 + 24#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Slam</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 24 伤害, and 每个敌人 adjacent to 目标 is 晕眩 until the end of Ogrémoch’s next turn.</p>]]

命中：4d8+24 伤害，且每个邻接目标的敌人晕眩直到欧雷莫奇下回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Ogrémoch’s Fury</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> Ogrémoch uses slam twice, or three times while he is 重伤. If Ogrémoch hits the same target more than once, he pushes 目标 10 squares and 目标 is treated as having failed a 豁免检定 against encasing shards if he or she is currently affected by it.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Earth Smash</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (creatures in the blast); +37 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 12 伤害, and 目标 falls prone and is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Earth Smash</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 12 伤害, and 目标 falls prone and is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Tremendous Quake</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 10 (creatures in the burst); +37 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 5d8 + 12 伤害, and Ogrémoch slides 目标 4 squares and knocks it prone. In addition, 目标 cannot stand up and is 晕眩 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害, and Ogrémoch slides 目标 1 square and knocks it prone.</p>]]

[[/roll 5d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Tremendous Quake</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 5d8 + 12 伤害, and Ogrémoch slides 目标 4 squares and knocks it prone. In addition, 目标 cannot stand up and is 晕眩 （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Earthshatter</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> Ogrémoch must be 重伤.</p><p><i>Target:</i> A petrified creature within 10 squares of Ogrémoch</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The creature is no longer petrified, and Ogrémoch makes the following attack centered on the creature and including the creature.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 3 (creatures in the burst); +37 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 12 伤害.</p>]] ᗕ 大地粉碎 Earthshatter ✦ 随意 1/round

前提：欧雷莫奇处于重伤。 [[/roll 3d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Earthshatter</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b> 1/round</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 12 伤害.</p>]]

目标：欧雷莫奇 10 格内的一个石化的生物 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Encasing Shards</b> ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (creatures in the blast); +37 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is 定身 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>First Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target is 震慑 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Second Failed Saving Throw:</i> The target is petrified (save ends; 目标 takes a -5 penalty to the 豁免检定).</p>]]

效果：该生物不再石化，且欧雷莫奇以该生物为中心并包含该生物进行下述攻击。攻击：近程爆发 3（爆发内所有生物）+37vs.强韧

命中：3d8+12 伤害。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Jagged Eruption</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy hits Ogrémoch with a melee attack.</p><p><i>Attack (Immediate Reaction):</i> Close burst 3 (enemies in the burst); +37 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 12 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Aftereffect:</i> The target takes 10 伤害.</p>]] ᗕ 崎岖爆发 Jagged Jagged Eruption ✦ 随意

触发：一个敌人以一次近战攻击命中欧雷莫奇。 [[/roll 2d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Jagged Eruption</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 12 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

攻击（直觉反应）：近程爆发 3（爆发内所有敌人）+37vs.反射命中：2d8+12 伤害，且目标定身（豁免终止）。

后续效果：目标受到 10 点伤害。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Eternal Resilience</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> Ogrémoch is subjected to an effect that a save can end.</p><p><i>Effect (No Action):</i> Ogrémoch makes a 豁免检定 against the effect.</p>]] 不朽耐力 Eternal Eternal Resilience ✦ 随意

效果（无动作）：欧雷莫奇对该效果进行一次豁免掷骰。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Variable Resistance</b> ✦ <b>3/Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> Ogrémoch takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> Ogrémoch gains resist 20 to the triggering 伤害 type until the end of the encounter or until it uses variable resistance again.</p>]] 可变抗性 Variable Variable Resistance ✦ 3/Encounter

触发：欧雷莫奇受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：欧雷莫奇获得 20 点触发伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束或直到它再次使用可变抗性。

基本近战：击打·随意

攻击：近战 4（一个生物）+39vs.AC

命中：4d8+24 伤害，且每个邻接目标的敌人晕眩直到欧雷莫奇下回合结束。

Ogrémoch's Fury.name: 欧雷莫奇狂怒 Ogrémoch's Fury
Ogrémoch's Fury.description:
欧雷莫奇狂怒 Ogrémoch's Fury

近战：欧雷莫奇狂怒·随意

效果：欧雷莫奇进行两次击打攻击，在其重伤期间则为三次。如果欧雷莫奇命中同一个目标超过一次，则他推动该目标 10 格且如果目标正受晶片困体影响的话则目标视为对晶片困体的豁免掷骰失败了一次。

Earth Smash.name: 大地暴扣 Earth Smash
Earth Smash.description:
大地暴扣 Earth Smash

近程：大地暴扣·随意

攻击：近程冲击 5（冲击内所有生物）+37vs.反射

命中：2d8+12 伤害，且目标倒地并晕眩（豁免终止）。失手：一半伤害。

Tremendous Quake.name: 大地震 Tremendous Quake
Tremendous Quake.description:
大地震 Tremendous Quake

近程：大地震·充能（当首次重伤时）

攻击：近程爆发 10（爆发内所有生物）+37vs.强韧

命中：5d8+12 伤害，且欧雷莫奇滑移目标 4 格并击倒它。此外，目标不能站起且晕眩（豁免终止两者）。

失手：一半伤害，且欧雷莫奇滑移目标 1 格并击倒它。

Earthshatter.name: 大地粉碎 Earthshatter
Earthshatter.description:
大地粉碎 Earthshatter

近程：大地粉碎·随意（一轮一次）

前提：欧雷莫奇处于重伤。

目标：欧雷莫奇 10 格内的一个石化的生物

效果：该生物不再石化，且欧雷莫奇以该生物为中心并包含该生物进行下述攻击。攻击：近程爆发 3（爆发内所有生物）+37vs.强韧

命中：3d8+12 伤害。

Encasing Shards.name: 晶片困体 Encasing Shards
Encasing Shards.description:
晶片困体 Encasing Shards

近程：晶片困体·充能 5,6

攻击：近程冲击 5（冲击内所有生物）+37vs.强韧

命中：目标定身（豁免终止）。

首次豁免失败时：目标震慑（豁免终止）。

第二次豁免失败时：目标石化（豁免终止；目标在该豁免掷骰受到-5 减值）。

Jagged Eruption.name: 崎岖爆发 Jagged Eruption
Jagged Eruption.description:
崎岖爆发 Jagged Eruption

近程：崎岖爆发·随意

触发：一个敌人以一次近战攻击命中欧雷莫奇。

攻击（直觉反应）：近程爆发 3（爆发内所有敌人）+37vs.反射命中：2d8+12 伤害，且目标定身（豁免终止）。

后续效果：目标受到 10 点伤害。

Eternal Resilience.name: 不朽耐力 Eternal Resilience
Eternal Resilience.description:
不朽耐力 Eternal Resilience

触发：欧雷莫奇受一个可以被豁免终止的效果影响。

效果（无动作）：欧雷莫奇对该效果进行一次豁免掷骰。

Variable Resistance.name: 可变抗性 Variable Resistance
Variable Resistance.description:
可变抗性 Variable Resistance

每遭遇三次

触发：欧雷莫奇受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：欧雷莫奇获得 20 点触发伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束或直到它再次使用可变抗性。

爆裂指令 Irresistible Command

噩梦惩罚 Nightmarish Punishment

该紫虫在震慑、晕眩或受控时可以进行直觉动作。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Blooded Frenzy</b> <b></b></p><p>While 重伤, the purple worm takes an extra minor action during its turn.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 3 (one creature); +24 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 9 伤害, and the purple worm shifts up to half its speed.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 3（一个生物）+24 vs. AC [[/roll 4d8 + 9#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 9 伤害, and the purple worm shifts up to half its speed.</p>]]

命中：4d8+9 伤害，且该紫虫快步最多其速度一半。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Devour Whole</b> (acid) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 3 (one creature); +22 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 8 伤害, and 目标 is swallowed (挣脱 DC 24). While swallowed, 目标 does not occupy a square and has neither line of sight nor line of effect to anything except the worm and other creatures swallowed by the worm; in addition, nothing has line of sight or line of effect to 目标 except other creatures swallowed by the worm. If 目标 attacks the worm using a close or an area attack, that attack targets all other creatures swallowed by the worm. While swallowed, 目标 takes 30 acid 伤害 at the end of its turn. When the effect ends or the worm drops to 0 hit points, 目标 appears in an unoccupied square of its choice adjacent to the worm.</p>]]

[[/roll 3d10 + 8#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Devour Whole</b> (acid) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d10 + 8 伤害, and 目标 is swallowed (挣脱 DC 24). While swallowed, 目标 does not occupy a square and has neither line of sight nor line of effect to anything except the worm and other creatures swallowed by the worm; in addition, nothing has line of sight or line of effect to 目标 except other creatures swallowed by the worm. If 目标 attacks the worm using a close or an area attack, that attack targets all other creatures swallowed by the worm. While swallowed, 目标 takes 30 acid 伤害 at the end of its turn. When the effect ends or the worm drops to 0 hit points, 目标 appears in an unoccupied square of its choice adjacent to the worm.</p>]]

效果：该罗刹妖改变其自身的物理形态为一个中型类人生物直到它再次使用迷罩或直到它生命值降到 0。其他生物可以进行一次 DC36 的洞察检定来识破该形态是幻术。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Persistent Image</b> (illusion) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The rakshasa creates an illusion of a Medium or smaller object or creature in an unoccupied square within 10 squares of it. A creature that succeeds on a DC 22 Insight check can see through the illusion. </p><p><i>Sustain Minor:</i> The illusion persists until the end of the rakshasa’s next turn, and the rakshasa can move the illusion up to 6 squares.</p>]] 持久幻象 Persistent Persistent Image (illusion) ✦ 随意

效果：该罗刹妖在它 10 格内的一个没被占据的格子生成一个中型或更小的物件或生物的幻象。该幻象可以动，但它不能发出声音。该幻象持续直到该罗刹妖下回合结束。一个成功通过 DC22 的洞察检定的生物可以看穿该幻术。

次要维持：该幻象继续持续直到该罗刹妖下回合结束，且该罗刹妖可以移动该幻象最多六格。

每当一次使用金属武器的攻击命中该锈蚀怪时，用于该攻击的武器生锈直到遭遇结束。在该武器生锈期间，通过该武器进行的攻击的攻击骰受到-1减值。若用来攻击该锈蚀怪的武器已经生锈，则对攻击骰的减值再恶化1点（该减值最多累计到-5）。

If 目标 is wearing armor that is already rusting, increase the penalty to AC by 1 (to a maximum penalty of -5).</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The rust monster shifts 1 square.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite ✦ 随意

When a melee or a ranged attack hits the displacer beast, if the player rolled an odd number on the attack roll, the attack misses. If the player rolled an even number on the attack roll, the attack hits as normal, and the beast loses this trait until the start of its next turn.

Aquatic.name: 水生 Aquatic
Aquatic.description:
水生 Aquatic

特性

该海巨妖可以在水下呼吸。在水中战斗时，它的攻击骰对非水生生物获得+2加值。

Threatening Reach.description:

该海巨妖可以对其3格内的敌人进行借机攻击。

Crushing Tentacles.description:

攻击：近战3（一个生物）+15vs.AC

效果：该海巨妖生成一个近程爆发3的结界持续直到遭遇结束。该结界是困难地形。任何在该结界内开始回合的生物受到5点伤害并被滑移2格。每轮一次以一个次要动作，该海巨妖可以移动该结界最多3格。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Depart Reality</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy misses the serpent.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The serpent is removed from play until the start of its next turn. 标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Short Sword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +11 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 7 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 短剑 Short Short Sword (weapon) ✦ 随意

命中：2d6+7 伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Shadow Curse</b> (implement, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one creature); +9 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 7 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 and takes 5 伤害 each time it provokes an opportunity attack （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d6 + 7#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Shadow Curse</b> (implement, necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 7 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 grants 战斗优势 and takes 5 伤害 each time it provokes an opportunity attack （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Choking Shadow</b> (implement, necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one creature); +9 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 11 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 until the end of the speaker’s next turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 3d6 + 11#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Choking Shadow</b> (implement, necrotic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 11 necrotic 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 until the end of the speaker’s next turn.</p>]]

移动动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Dark Step</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The speaker moves 4 squares, gains a +4 bonus to AC against opportunity attacks provoked by this movement, and gains 战斗优势 against 每个生物 that it ends its move adjacent to until the end of the shadow speaker’s next turn.</p>]] 暗遁 Dark Dark Step ✦ 随意

效果：该暗影语者移动 4 格，对抗由该移动引发的借机攻击时 AC 获得+4 加值，且对所有当它结束该移动时邻接它的生物获得战斗优势直到该暗影语者下回合结束。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Killing Dark</b> <b></b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The speaker drops to 0 hit points.</p><p><i>Effect (No Action):</i> Each enemy adjacent to the speaker is 目盲 until the end of his or her next turn.</p>]] 死于黑暗 Killing Killing Dark

触发：该暗影语者的生命值降到 0。
