命中：1d8+6 黯蚀伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Shadow Stalk</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when the stalker uses shadow step</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +8 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 8 necrotic 伤害, and the stalker shifts into 目标’s space and melds with its shadow （豁免终止）. While the stalker is melded with 目标’s shadow, it moves when 目标 moves without provoking opportunity attacks, and it gains a +4 bonus to all defenses and a +5 bonus to attack rolls against 目标. [[/roll 1d6 + 8#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Shadow Stalk</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when the stalker uses shadow step</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 8 necrotic 伤害, and the stalker shifts into 目标’s space and melds with its shadow （豁免终止）. 触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Shadow Step</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> A living creature within 5 squares of the stalker drops to 0 hit points or fewer.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The stalker teleports to a square adjacent to the triggering creature and gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 暗影跃 Shadow Shadow Step (teleportation) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Corrupting Touch</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one or two creatures); +32 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d6 + 10 psychic 伤害, and 目标 takes a -2 penalty to defenses against charm effects until the end of the sire of corruption’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 堕落之触 Corrupting Corrupting Touch (psychic) ✦ 随意

攻击：+32vs.意志（一个或两个生物） [[/roll 4d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Corrupting Touch</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d6 + 10 psychic 伤害, and 目标 takes a -2 penalty to defenses against charm effects until the end of the sire of corruption’s next turn.</p>]]

The target must make an opportunity attack against any ally that takes an action that would provoke opportunity attacks from enemies （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>* Fear:</i> The sire of corruption pushes 目标 5 squares. The target cannot willingly move nearer to the sire than the square where 目标 started its turn （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>* Sloth:</i> The target is 定身 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>* Vengeance:</i> The target takes 2d10 + 10 伤害 whenever it uses an attack power （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 4d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Touch of Vice</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚃ ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d6 + 10 psychic 伤害, and choose one of the following:</p>]]

[[/roll 2d10 + 10#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Touch of Vice</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚃ ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>* Vengeance:</i> The target takes 2d10 + 10 伤害 whenever it uses an attack power （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Call to Corruption</b> ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Six corrupted followers appear in unoccupied squares within 5 squares of the sire of corruption. The corrupted followers act immediately after the sire of corruption in the initiative order.</p>]]

·欲望：目标被其五格内的一个敌人标记（豁免终止）。

·无度：目标晕眩（豁免终止）。

·贪婪：该堕落魔王滑移目标 5 格到一个邻接目标的一个盟友的格子。目标必须对任何进行会引发敌人的借机攻击的动作的盟友发动借机攻击（豁免终止）。

·恐惧：该堕落魔王推动目标 5 格。目标不能主动移动到比它开始回合时所在的格子离该堕落魔王更近的位置。

·懒惰：目标定身（豁免终止）。

·仇恨：每当目标使用攻击威能时便会受到 2d10+10 伤害（豁免终止）。

效果：该皮翼比蒙飞行其速度的格数并在该移动中的任一时点进行一次啮咬攻击。该皮翼比蒙在该移动中离开攻击目标时不会引发该目标的借机攻击。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Grasping Talons</b> ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The skinwing must be flying.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The skinwing uses flyby attack, and if the attack hits, the skinwing grabs 目标 of the attack.</p>]] ⚔ 擒拿爪 Grasping Grasping Talons ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅

前提：该皮翼比蒙必须处于飞行。

效果：该皮翼比蒙进行一次飞越攻击，且若该攻击命中，则该皮翼比蒙擒抱该攻击的目标。

Strafe.name: 空袭 Strafe
Strafe.description:
空袭 Strafe

坐骑

当该皮翼比蒙在有一个 LV7 或以上的友方骑手骑乘它的情况下使用飞越攻击时，它的骑手可以进行一次基本近战攻击来代替该皮翼比蒙的啮咬攻击。

Drag Off.name: 拖拽 Drag Off
Drag Off.description:
拖拽 Drag Off

当该皮翼比蒙移动时，它拖动任何被它擒抱的生物跟着它一起移动。此外，该生物依然被擒抱，且该皮翼比蒙不引发这个被擒抱的生物的借机攻击。

被动 侦查 14 | 洞察 14

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Stealthy Step</b> <b></b></p><p>The hunter does not take a penalty to Stealth checks for moving more than 2 squares or for running.</p>]] 隐秘脚步 Stealthy Stealthy Step

该潜伏人猎人的隐秘检定不会因移动超过 2 格或奔跑而受到减值。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Baffling Blade</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +10 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d8 + 6 伤害, and the hunter remains hidden from 目标 if it was hidden from 目标 when it attacked.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The target is marked until the end of the hunter’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 迷幻刃 Baffling Baffling Blade (weapon) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+10 vs. AC [[/roll 1d8 + 6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Baffling Blade</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d8 + 6 伤害, and the hunter remains hidden from 目标 if it was hidden from 目标 when it attacked.</p>]]

命中：1d8+6 伤害，且当目标被攻击时如果该潜伏人猎人对其躲藏那么该潜伏人猎人保持对目标躲藏。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Invisible Blade</b> (weapon) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature that cannot see the hunter); +10 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 6 伤害, and 持续 5 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The target is marked until the end of the hunter’s next turn.</p>]]

效果：目标被标记直到该潜伏人猎人下回合结束。 [[/roll 2d8 + 6#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Invisible Blade</b> (weapon) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 6 伤害, and 持续 5 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Watchful Hunter</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy marked by the hunter shifts.</p><p><i>Effect (Opportunity Action):</i> The hunter can use baffling blade against the triggering enemy.</p>]] 猎人警觉 Watchful Watchful Hunter ✦ 随意

When the devil moves, it pulls 目标 with it. In addition, 目标 remains 攫抓, and the devil does not provoke an opportunity attack from 目标.</p>]]

集群

在晕眩期间，该咒术编织者可以花费一个标准动作和一个次要动作而不是只有一个标准动作，且它仍可以进行直觉动作。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Chilling Echo</b> (cold) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> One or two creatures that the weaver has damaged since the start of its turn take 15 cold 伤害.</p>]] 寒冷回响 Chilling Chilling Echo (cold) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Extract Arcane Soul</b> (healing, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The weaver must be holding a chromatic disk.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one 重伤 creature that has arcane powers); +33 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The weaver regains 20 hit points.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Corrupting Touch</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +14 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 6 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 堕落之触 Corrupting Corrupting Touch ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+14 vs. AC [[/roll 3d6 + 6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Corrupting Touch</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d6 + 6 伤害.</p>]]

命中：3d6+6 伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Charming Kiss</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +12 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target cannot attack the succubus. The effect lasts until the succubus or one of its allies attacks 目标, the succubus drops to 0 hit points, or the succubus uses this power again. If 目标 is affected by charming kiss at the end of the encounter, the effect lasts until the succubus fails to kiss 目标 during a 24-hour period. See also loyal consort.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Dominate</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one creature); +12 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The target is 受控 until the end of the succubus’s next turn.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Change Shape</b> (polymorph) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The succubus alters its physical form to appear as a Medium humanoid until it uses change shape again or until it drops to 0 hit points. To assume a specific individual’s form, the succubus must have seen that individual. Other creatures can make a DC 30 Insight check to discern that the form is a disguise.</p>]] 改变形态 Change Change Shape (polymorph) ✦ 随意

[[/roll 2d6 + 6#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Pounce</b> ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 6 伤害, and 目标 falls prone.</p>]]

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Multitasking Brain</b> <b></b></p><p>While 晕眩, the thought weaver can spend a standard action and a minor action instead of only a standard action, and it can still take immediate actions.</p>]] 多重大脑 Multitasking Multitasking Brain

在晕眩期间，该思想编织者可以花费一个标准动作和一个次要动作而不是只有一个标准动作，且它仍可以进行直觉动作。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Coordinated Strike</b> <b></b></p><p>Once per round during its turn, the weaver can spend a standard action, a move action, or a minor action to allow one ally within 5 squares of it to immediately use an action of the same type as a free action.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Command the Puppet</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> One creature 受控 by the weaver within 10 squares of it takes 2d6 + 10 psychic 伤害. In addition, the weaver slides the creature 5 squares. The creature then uses an at-will attack of the weaver’s choice against one of its allies of the weaver’s choice.</p>]] 操控傀儡 Command the Command the Puppet (charm, psychic) ✦ 随意

标准动作 [[/roll 2d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Command the Puppet</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> One creature 受控 by the weaver within 10 squares of it takes 2d6 + 10 psychic 伤害. In addition, the weaver slides the creature 5 squares. The creature then uses an at-will attack of the weaver’s choice against one of its allies of the weaver’s choice.</p>]]

效果：该思想编织者10格内的一个受控于该思想编织者的生物受到2d6+10心灵伤害。此外，该思想编织者滑移该生物5格。然后该生物对它的一个由该思想编织者选择的盟友进行一次由该思想编织者选择的随意攻击。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Mental Puppet</b> (charm) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when no creature is 受控 by this power</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one creature); +32 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The weaver slides 目标 5 squares. The target then makes a basic attack against one of its allies of the weaver’s choice. In addition, 目标 is 受控 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Quick Strike</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +32 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 快速打击 Quick Quick Strike ✦ 随意

随意 [[/roll 2d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Quick Strike</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 伤害.</p>]]

次要动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Mind Spike</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 10 (one creature); +31 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 psychic 伤害, 目标 takes a -2 penalty to all defenses until the end of the thought weaver’s next turn, and the thought weaver slides 目标 3 squares.</p>]]

攻击：近战1（一个生物）+32 vs. AC [[/roll 2d6 + 10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Mind Spike</b> (psychic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 10 psychic 伤害, 目标 takes a -2 penalty to all defenses until the end of the thought weaver’s next turn, and the thought weaver slides 目标 3 squares.</p>]]

命中：2d6+10伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Extract Psionic Soul</b> (healing, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The weaver must be holding a chromatic disk.</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one 重伤 creature that has psionic powers); +30 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d12 + 12 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The weaver regains 25 hit points.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d12 + 12#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Extract Psionic Soul</b> (healing, psychic) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d12 + 12 psychic 伤害, and 目标 is 晕眩 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Guardian Puppet</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy willingly leaves a square adjacent to a creature 受控 by the weaver.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Interrupt):</i> The 受控 creature makes a basic attack against the triggering enemy.</p>]] 守护者傀儡 Guardian Guardian Puppet (charm) ✦ 随意

随意

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Variable Resistance</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The schemer takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The schemer gains resist 20 to the triggering 伤害 type until the end of the encounter.</p>]] 可变抗性 Variable Variable Resistance ✦ 遭遇

触发：该欧特罗魔谋士受到强酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电或雷鸣伤害。

效果（自由动作）：该欧特罗魔谋士获得 20 点触发的伤害类型的抗性直到遭遇结束。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Self-Preservation</b> (illusion, teleportation) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy bloodies the schemer.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The schemer teleports, swapping places with an ally it can see within 10 squares. The schemer becomes 隐形 until the end of its next turn, and the ally can make a melee basic attack as a free action against the enemy that 重伤 the schemer if it is within the ally’s reach.</p>]] 自我保护 Self-Preservation (illusion, teleportation) ✦ 遭遇

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Wrath of the Destroyer</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> A 重伤 enemy attacks the destroyer or one of the destroyer’s allies adjacent to it.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The destroyer uses greatclub against the triggering enemy. If the attack hits, 目标 is also 震慑 until the end of the triggering enemy’s next turn.</p>]] ⚔ 破坏者之怒 Wrath of the Wrath of the Destroyer ✦ 遭遇

If both attacks hit the same creature, that creature is 定身 (save ends</p><p><i>Aftereffect:</i> The target is 迟缓 （豁免终止）.</p>]] ⚔ 双重攻击 Double Double Attack ✦ 随意

如果枯皮怪对提供战斗优势给它的生物的攻击命中，该生物受到 1d6 额外伤害。 [[/roll 1d6 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Combat Advantage</b> <b></b></p><p>If a witherling hits with an attack against a creature that grants it 战斗优势, that creature takes 1d6 extra 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Pack Attack</b> <b></b></p><p>The witherling’s attacks deal 2 extra 伤害 to any enemy adjacent to two or more of the witherling’s allies.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +9 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 4 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 （豁免终止）.</p>]] (⚔) 爪击 Claw ✦ 随意

命中：2d6 + 4 伤害，且目标迟缓（豁免终止）。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Sudden Leap</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The witherling jumps 4 squares. During the jump, it gains a +5 bonus to AC against opportunity attacks, and any enemy that misses the witherling with an opportunity attack grants 战斗优势 to it until the end of the witherling’s turn.</p>]] 飞跃 Sudden Sudden Leap ✦ 随意

AC 26Fort 21Ref 21Will 24

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Regeneration (healing)</b> <b></b></p><p>Whenever the wood nymph has at least 1 hit point and starts its turn adjacent to or within its tree, it regains 5 hit points. </p>]] Regeneration (healing)

Whenever the wood nymph has at least 1 hit point and starts its turn adjacent to or within its tree, it regains 5 hit points.

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Treebound </b> <b></b></p><p>Each wood nymph is bound to a tree that occupies 1 square. The wood nymph can enter this square and has superior cover while there. In addition, the wood nymph treats the tree as an ally for the purpose of flanking.</p>]] Treebound

Each wood nymph is bound to a tree that occupies 1 square. The wood nymph can enter this square and has superior cover while there. In addition, the wood nymph treats the tree as an ally for the purpose of flanking.

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Wooden Hands</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +15 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 5 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 until the end of the nymph’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 木手 Wooden Wooden Hands ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）+15 vs. AC [[/roll 3d8 + 5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Wooden Hands</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 5 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 until the end of the nymph’s next turn.</p>]]

命中：3d8+5 伤害，且目标迟缓直到该木仙女下回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Trapped in the Wood</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when no enemy is within the nymph’s tree</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +13 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The nymph teleports 目标 6 squares to the square containing the nymph’s tree, and 目标 is removed from play （豁免终止）. When the effect ends, 目标 appears in an unoccupied square of its choice adjacent to the tree.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The nymph teleports 8 squares to a square adjacent to its tree.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Lonely Keening</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 20 (one creature); +15 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 psychic 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Until the end of the encounter or until the nymph drops to 0 hit points, 目标 is marked and takes 5 伤害 at the end of any turn in which it is not either adjacent to the nymph or closer to the nymph than when it began its turn.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d8 + 9#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Lonely Keening</b> (charm, psychic) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 psychic 伤害.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Tree Home</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Requirement:</i> The nymph must be within 6 squares of its tree.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The nymph teleports to a square adjacent to its tree.</p>]] 树家 Tree Tree Home (teleportation) ✦ 随意

前提：该木仙女必须在其树 6 格内。

每当该木仙女在至少有 1 点生命值的情况下邻接或在其树内部开始回合时，它恢复 5 点生命值。

树之绑定 Treebound

每个木仙女都绑定着一颗占据 1 格的树。该木仙女可以进入该格子且在其内期间获得超级掩蔽。此外，该木仙女视该树为可以与之构成夹击的盟友。

Wraith.name: 缚灵 Wraith
Wraith.description:
生命值 53; 重伤 26
抗性 10 necrotic 免疫 disease, poison 		先攻 +10
AC 19Fort 17Ref 18Will 15
速度 0, 飞行 6 （盘旋）; phasing
属性力量 4 (null)
体质 17 (+5)		敏捷 18 (+6)
智力 6 (0)		感知 10 (+2)
魅力 15 (+4)
语言 Common
阵营 chaotic evil
技能 Stealth +11感官 黑暗视觉
被动 侦查 12 | 洞察 12

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Insubstantial</b> <b></b></p><p>The wraith takes half 伤害 from all attacks, except those that deal force 伤害. Whenever the wraith takes radiant 伤害, it loses this trait until the start of its next turn.</p>]] 虚体 Insubstantial

该缚灵从所有攻击都只受到一半伤害，除了那些造成力场伤害的。每当该缚灵受到光耀伤害时，它失去该特性直到其下回合开始。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Spawn Wraith</b> <b></b></p><p>When the wraith kills a humanoid, that humanoid becomes a wraith figment at the start of this wraith’s next turn. The new wraith appears in the space where the humanoid died or in the nearest unoccupied square, and it rolls a new initiative check. The new wraith acts under the Dungeon Master’s control.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Shadow Touch</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one creature); +8 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 6 necrotic 伤害, or 4d6 + 14 necrotic 伤害 if the wraith was 隐形 to 目标 when it attacked.</p>]] (⚔) 暗影之触 Shadow Shadow Touch (necrotic) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战1（一个生物）+8 vs. 反射 [[/roll 2d6 + 6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Shadow Touch</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 6 necrotic 伤害, or 4d6 + 14 necrotic 伤害 if the wraith was 隐形 to 目标 when it attacked.</p>]]

命中：2d6+6黯蚀伤害，若该缚灵攻击时对目标隐形则为4d6+14黯蚀伤害。 [[/roll 4d6 + 14#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Shadow Touch</b> (necrotic) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 6 necrotic 伤害, or 4d6 + 14 necrotic 伤害 if the wraith was 隐形 to 目标 when it attacked.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Shadow Glide</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An attack that does not deal force or radiant 伤害 hits the wraith.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The wraith becomes 隐形 until it hits or misses with an attack or until the end of the encounter. The wraith teleports up to 6 squares and cannot attack until the end of its next turn.</p>]] 暗影滑翔 Shadow Shadow Glide (teleportation) ✦ 随意

触发：一次不造成力场或光耀伤害的攻击命中该缚灵。

效果（自由动作）：该缚灵隐形直到它攻击命中或失手或直到遭遇结束。该缚灵瞬移最多6格且不能攻击直到其下回合结束。

该缚灵从所有攻击都只受到一半伤害，除了那些造成力场伤害的。每当该缚灵受到光耀伤害时，它失去该特性直到其下回合开始。

效果：该耶提暴怒者快步其速度的格数且在该快步中可以进入敌人的空间。每当该耶提暴怒者在该快步中首次进入一个敌人的空间时，它对该敌人进行下述攻击。

攻击：近战 0；+8 vs. 反射

命中：1d6+4 伤害，且该敌人倒地。

Fearsome Howl.name: 恐怖嚎叫 Fearsome Howl
Fearsome Howl.description:
恐怖嚎叫 Fearsome Howl

近程：恐怖嚎叫（恐惧，雷鸣）·遭遇

攻击：近程冲击 4（冲击内所有敌人）+8 vs. 意志

命中：1d10+6 雷鸣伤害，且该耶提暴怒者推动目标 3 格。

Young Black Dragon.name: 幼年黑龙 Young Black Dragon
Young Black Dragon.description:
生命值 208; 重伤 104
抗性 10 acid 		先攻 +11 | 行动点 2 | 豁免 +5
AC 18Fort 16Ref 18Will 15
速度 7 (swamp walk), 飞行 7, 游泳 7
属性力量 16 (+5)
体质 12 (+3)		敏捷 20 (+7)
智力 12 (+3)		感知 15 (+4)
魅力 10 (+2)
语言 Common, Draconic
阵营 evil
技能 Stealth +12感官 黑暗视觉
被动 侦查 14 | 洞察 14

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Acidic Blood </b> (acid) <b></b></p><p>Whenever the dragon takes 伤害 while it is 重伤, 每个生物 adjacent to it takes 5 acid 伤害.</p>]] Acidic Blood (acid)

Whenever the dragon takes 伤害 while it is 重伤, 每个生物 adjacent to it takes 5 acid 伤害.

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Aquatic</b> <b></b></p><p>The dragon can breathe underwater. In aquatic combat, it gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls against nonaquatic creatures.</p>]] 水生 Aquatic

该龙可以在水下呼吸。在水中战斗时，它对非水生生物的攻击骰获得+2 加值。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Instinctive Devouring</b> <b></b></p><p>On an initiative of 10 + its initiative check, the dragon can use a free action to charge or to use bite. If the dragon cannot use a free action to make this attack due to a dominating or stunning effect, then that effect ends instead of the dragon making the attack.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Action Recovery</b> <b></b></p><p>Whenever the dragon ends its turn, any dazing, stunning, or dominating effect on it ends.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (acid) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +9 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 4 伤害, and 持续 5 acid 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> 5 acid 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite (acid) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+9 vs. AC [[/roll 2d8 + 4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (acid) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 4 伤害, and 持续 5 acid 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

命中：2d8+4 伤害，以及 5 点持续强酸伤害（豁免终止）。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Claw</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one or two creatures); +9 vs. AC. If the dragon targets only one creature, it can make this attack twice against that creature</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 5 伤害.</p>]]

失手：5 强酸伤害。 [[/roll 2d6 + 5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Claw</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 5 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Breath Weapon</b> (acid) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast); +7 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 acid 伤害, and 持续 5 acid 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d8 + 3#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Breath Weapon</b> (acid) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 acid 伤害, and 持续 5 acid 伤害 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Shroud of Gloom</b> ✦ Recharge ⚅</p><p><i>Effect:</i> Close burst 5 (enemies in the burst). Each target gains vulnerable 5 acid and takes a -2 penalty to attack rolls until the end of the encounter. A character can use a standard action to attempt a DC 10 Heal check to end this effect on himself or herself or an adjacent ally.</p>]]

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Tail Sweep</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy misses the dragon with a melee attack. </p><p><i>Attack (Opportunity Action):</i> Melee 3 (the triggering enemy); +7 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 2 伤害, and 目标 falls prone. In addition, each of 目标’s allies adjacent to 目标 takes 5 伤害.</p>]] ⚔ 扫尾 Tail Tail Sweep ✦ 随意

触发：一个敌人的近战攻击对该龙失手。 [[/roll 1d6 + 2#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Tail Sweep</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 2 伤害, and 目标 falls prone. In addition, each of 目标’s allies adjacent to 目标 takes 5 伤害.</p>]]

攻击（借机动作）：近战 3（触发的敌人）+7 vs. 反射

命中：1d6+2 伤害，且目标倒地。此外，邻接目标的每个目标的盟友都受到 5 点伤害。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Bloodied Breath</b> ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The dragon is first 重伤.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> Breath weapon recharges, and the dragon uses it.</p>]] ᗕ 重伤喷吐 Bloodied Bloodied Breath ✦ 遭遇

触发：该龙首次重伤。

效果（自由动作）：龙息充能，且该龙使用它。

Acidic Blood.name: 酸性血液 Acidic Blood
Acidic Blood.description:
酸性血液 Acidic Blood

特性

每当该龙在重伤时受到伤害时，邻接它的每个生物受到 5 点强酸伤害。

Aquatic.name: 水生 Aquatic
Aquatic.description:
水生 Aquatic

特性

该龙可以在水下呼吸。在水中战斗时，它对非水生生物的攻击骰获得+2 加值。

Instinctive Devouring.name: 本能吞噬 Instinctive Devouring
Instinctive Devouring.description:
本能吞噬 Instinctive Devouring

特性

在 10+该龙先攻检定值的先攻序位，该龙可以使用一个自由动作来进行冲锋或使用啮咬。如果该龙因受控或震慑效果而不能使用自由动作来进行该攻击，则作为该龙进行该攻击的代替，那效果终止。

Action Recovery.name: 行动恢复 Action Recovery
Action Recovery.description:
行动恢复 Action Recovery

特性

每当该龙回合结束时，其身上任何晕眩、震慑或受控效果终止。

Bite.name: 啮咬 Bite
Bite.description:
啮咬 Bite

基本近战：啮咬（强酸）·随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+9 vs. AC

命中：2d8+4 伤害，以及 5 点持续强酸伤害（豁免终止）。

失手：5 强酸伤害。

Claw.description:
爪击 Claw

命中：2d6+5 伤害。

Breath Weapon.description:

攻击：近程冲击 5（范围内所有敌人）+7 vs. 反射

命中：2d8+3 强酸伤害，以及 5 点持续强酸伤害（豁免终止）。

失手：一半伤害。

Shroud of Gloom.name: 暗影笼罩 Shroud of Gloom
Shroud of Gloom.description:
暗影笼罩 Shroud of Gloom

暗影笼罩·充能 6

效果：近程爆发 5（范围内所有敌人）。所有目标获得 5 点强酸易伤且攻击骰受到-2 减值直到遭遇结束。人物可以使用一个标准动作来通过一次 DC10 的医疗检定以终止其自身或邻接的一个盟友身上的该效果。

Tail Sweep.name: 扫尾 Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description:
扫尾 Tail Sweep

近战：扫尾·随意

触发：一个敌人的近战攻击对该龙失手。

攻击（借机动作）：近战 3（触发的敌人）+7 vs. 反射

命中：1d6+2 伤害，且目标倒地。此外，邻接目标的每个目标的盟友都受到 5 点伤害。

Bloodied Breath.description:
重伤喷吐 Bloodied Breath

近程：重伤喷吐·遭遇

触发：该龙首次重伤。

效果（自由动作）：龙息充能，且该龙使用它。

Young Blizzard Dragon.name: 幼年雪暴龙 Young Blizzard Dragon
Young Blizzard Dragon.description:
生命值 166; 重伤 83先攻 +8 | 行动点 1 | 豁免 +2
AC 21Fort 19Ref 20Will 18
速度 8 (ice walk), 飞行 8 （笨拙）
属性力量 16 (+6)
体质 19 (+7)		敏捷 20 (+8)
智力 17 (+6)		感知 17 (+6)
魅力 14 (+5)
语言 Common, Draconic, Primordial
阵营 unaligned
感官 黑暗视觉
被动 侦查 16 | 洞察 16

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⌀ <b>Freezing Winds</b> ✦ <b>Aura</b> 1</p><p>The dragon slides any enemy that ends its turn in the aura 1 square.</p>]] ⌀ 急冻之风 Freezing Freezing Winds ✦ 灵气 1

该幼年雪暴龙滑移任何在该灵气内结束回合的敌人 1 格。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (cold) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +12 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 until the end of the dragon’s next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 啮咬 Bite (cold) ✦ 随意

攻击：近战 2（一个生物）+12vs.AC [[/roll 2d8 + 3#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (cold) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 定身 until the end of the dragon’s next turn.</p>]]

命中：2d8+3 寒冷伤害，且目标定身直到该幼年雪暴龙下回合结束。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (cold) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 2 (one creature); +12 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 8 cold 伤害, and the dragon slides 目标 2 squares.</p>]]

[[/roll 2d6 + 8#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (cold) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 8 cold 伤害, and the dragon slides 目标 2 squares.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Double Attack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The dragon uses bite and claw or uses claw twice.</p>]]

自由动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Rising Winds</b> (cold) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> at the start of any turn when freezing winds is aura 1</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The freezing winds expands to aura 3. At the start of the dragon’s next turn, the freezing winds expands to aura 5. At the start of its following turn, the dragon makes the following attack.</p><p><i>Attack (No Action):</i> Close burst 5 (enemies in the burst); +10 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 and 目盲 （豁免终止两者）.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The freezing winds aura reverts to its original state and size (aura 1).</p>]] ᗕ 气流增幅 Rising Rising Winds (cold) ✦ 充能 at the start of any turn when freezing winds is aura 1

效果：急冻之风扩大为灵气 3。在该幼年雪暴龙下回合开始时，急冻之风扩大为灵气 5。在其再下一个回合开始时，该幼年雪暴龙进行下述攻击。 [[/roll 2d8 + 5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Rising Winds</b> (cold) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> at the start of any turn when freezing winds is aura 1</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 5 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 and 目盲 （豁免终止两者）.</p>]]

攻击（无动作）：近程爆发 5（爆发内所有敌人）+10vs.强韧 命中：2d8+5 寒冷伤害，且目标迟缓并目盲（豁免终止两者）。

效果：急冻之风灵气恢复为原来的状态和大小（灵气 1）。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Chill Rebuke</b> (cold) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy’s melee attack deals 伤害 to the dragon.</p><p><i>Attack (Immediate Reaction):</i> Close blast 5 (enemies in the blast); +11 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d10 + 5 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 （豁免终止）.</p>]] ᗕ 寒冷斥责 Chill Chill Rebuke (cold) ✦ 充能 when first 重伤

触发：一个敌人的近战攻击对该幼年雪暴龙造成伤害。 [[/roll 1d10 + 5#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Chill Rebuke</b> (cold) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first 重伤</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d10 + 5 cold 伤害, and 目标 is 迟缓 （豁免终止）.</p>]]

攻击（直觉反应）：近程冲击 5（冲击内所有敌人）+11vs.强韧命中：1d10+5 寒冷伤害，且目标迟缓（豁免终止）。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Sudden Flurry</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The dragon is hit by a cold attack.</p><p><i>Effect (Free Action):</i> The dragon slides 每个敌人 in its aura 1 square.</p>]] 急突飓风 Sudden Sudden Flurry ✦ 随意

触发：该幼年雪暴龙被一次寒冷攻击命中。

效果（自由动作）：该幼年雪暴龙滑移其灵气内的每个敌人 1 格。

该幼年雪暴龙滑移任何在该灵气内结束回合的敌人 1 格。

This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Instinctive Flyby</b> <b></b></p><p>On an initiative of 10 + its initiative check, the dragon can use a free action to use flyby attack. If the dragon cannot use a free action to make this attack due to a dominating or stunning effect, then that effect ends instead of the dragon making the attack.</p>]]
